Quar ta eſt pars bereditatuni z poffeffionum Quinta eſt pars nobilis tatis nati vtrum fit fili illius cui imponit vel non.Sexta eft pars Anis rerum.lbum azar dicit quod pars patris fignificat eé patris z eius no bilitatis ats generis, z fi bec pars fuerit boni effe pater erit nobilis. Er fido minus domus buius partis fuerit boni effe pater erit fortunatus. Si vo fue rit mali effet erit laborioſus A seda parte huius domus que est pars motis patris accipiť cauſa mortis: quotienfcunqs pfectio anni puenerit ad hanc partem vel ad onm eius fignificat periculum patri.z fils cum peruenerit ali quis eorum ad fignificatores patris. Ainta domus bic ponit partes gure domus ? funt ſeptem. Pa ma est pars filios rum.Scda est pars tempors in quo debent haberi filij. Zertia eſt pars pp qua ſeit masculinitas vel femininitas. Quarta eſt ps per qua ſcit de nato de quo fit interrogatio utrú fit maſculus vel femina. Quinta eſt po ad quá cũ puenert iupit est fignificatio filij.Sexta eſt pars dilectionis filior. Septima est pars ſcientie filioru. Dicit Albumazar fi pars filiorum ceciderit in ſigno multorú filiorum bébit multos filios.Si vo ceciderir in ſigno ſterili nó bébit aliqué filium. Si vo ceciderit in ſigno pauco rú filioy bébit paucos filios. Et fi bec pars fignificauerit filios fuerit fonu, nata filij viuent:z ſi infotunata morient. Erta domus. Pic ponit partes ſexte domus sunt due. Prima eſt pars azemena idest debilitatis infeparabilis alicuius membri.Scda est ps feruor. Si ps azemena fuerit cõiuncta cum fortunis erit natus ſanus in membris fuis. Si vo fuerit piūcta ifortunis bébit morbos infeparabiles in membris. z loca in quibus erunt be egritudines ſciunt a locis infortunari fignificátiú eas. Dic ponit partes ſeptime do mº 7 funt quattuor. Prima est pars defponfationis virop. Scda eſt pars deſpoſationis mulie rú.z bec accipit duob modis. Lertia eſt delectatióis z volupta Eptima domus.hi tis. Quarta eft ps nuptiay. On ps deſpoſatidis puenerit per di rectioné ad Joué vel veneré eſt ſignificatio deſpoſatidis. Et ego iuent in vna natiuitate tps deſponſatióis qn dis pris deſponſationis puenit ad ipaz ptē per directioné dando cuilibet gradui annum vnum. Octaua domusicals.co 8. Picponit partes octane domus hunt eſt pars plaete qui iterficit. Zertia eſt ps áni i quo veniet nato mors aut pau ptas ré. Quarta é pe prétióis z litigatióis.Dic albūazar fips mont fucrit ipe dita z dis eius z non afpexerint eos fortune interhciek natus morte turpifi ma. Si vo afpexerint fortune erit ecótrario.Si Inna ſol afpexerit partem pla nete interficientis z ipſa luna fuerit in figno membromm abſciſox nat iters ficiek patiédo. Et fi luna fuerit impedita abſcidet ei aligd de membris.On.ps anni in quo timeť nato mors 2 dns eius cú dño afcendentis fuerint impedi ti eric natus multarum infirmitatu z afflictionis in coupe atos ſubſtatia a mul totiens appropinqbit peditioni corporis z amiſſione ſubſtatie.z quotienscus pfectio anni puenerit ad hanc partem:aut peruenerit bec pars per pfectio nem aut directionem ad ascendens aut ad dim eius inueniet natus pericu la in coupe z infirmitatibus z inueniet angustia z boribile in ſubſtatia.time: bit quoqz moité ex diuerfis partibus. one na domus. Dic ponit partes none domus z funt Due. Prima eft pare peregrinatióis. Scda est pars itineris in ağ.Ab istis accipiunt pegrinatiões nas ti z itinera per aquas.Albumazar dicit. Sipars itineris in ağ ceciderit in figno aquatico faciet natus multa itinera per aquas z fiibi fuerit fortunata babebit in fuis itinerib profectum ac lucrum.z fi fues rit infortunata fignificat contrarium. Ecima domus funtime e pare regiis at 3 regni.Secunda eft pars regis atqz regni. Zertia est pars in cipatum opis regni. Quarta eſt pars fignificans utrum fit cauſa regni vel non. Quinta eſt pars matrum. Adecima domus.com Dic ponit partes vndecime domus a funt due. Prima é pars amicorum.Secuda est pars ſignificans profectum z effe, ctum z amiciciam amicorum. Pic ponit vnaz ſola par Aodecima domuseumr inimicorú. Et bee ſunt ptes alie gb utunk magiftriiudiciozn. Dic ponit öſda alías ptes que non funt in aliq domoy z funt fex. Pri ma eſt po mendacij rumor. Scda eſt ps rónis z pfunditatis fenfus. Zertia é po fapiétier difciplie.Quarta eft ps guerre z plior. Quita eft ps pacio. Ser ta eſt po afpiciédi in revolutióe annop.z oés iſte piciunt ab afcédéte. I quia auxiliante deo. Prius auctor po fuit ptes que cass dut in nativitatib. Dic ponit ptes que cadutin revolutionib? an noz műdí. Et pót diuidiin duas ptes:qm pmo ponit ptes qb uru tur magiftri iudicioy in revolutionib? in caufis regnop.cбо ро nit pres qboytunt magiſtri iudiciopin pſciédo forŭ rerú.fcda eſt ibi. Jté funt bic alie ptes.Dicit o ex ptib que exercent in revolutióib annox mundi ad ſciédů cas regni atqz iperij z iſta accipiť a marte in luna: z piicit ab afcédéte piúctióis que fignificat mutationé regni z accipiť alio mo a gradu afcédétis pinctióis in gradú piūctióis itelligédo a gradu afcédétis reuolutiõis áni in
translation: There are two parts of the third house. The first is the Part of Brothers. The second is the Part of the Benevolence of Brothers. Albumazar says that the Part of Brothers and its lord, that is, the lord of the sign in which it falls, signify the existence of brothers and their concord and love, and their peregrination and absence. After this, see if this part and its lord fall in signs of many children, then the brothers will be many. And if they fall in signs of few children, they will be few. And if you wish to know their number, take the number of signs that were between the part and the lord of the house in which it fell, or how many there were between the lord and the part, and assign one to each sign. And if there is a common sign between them, double the number of that sign. And if there is any other planet between the part itself and the lord of the house in which it fell, also assign one to it. Albumazar also places one part in this house which is called the Part of the Death of Brothers, and he says that it is taken in the day from the Sun to the degree of the Midheaven, and at night the opposite. And the degrees of the Ascendant are added above, and it is projected from the Ascendant. As often as this part comes by direction to the significators of brothers and sisters, giving one year to each degree, or by perfection, giving a year to each sign, something horrible will happen to the brothers and sisters, or some of them will die. The Fourth House. Here are placed the parts of the fourth house, and there are five. The first is the Part of Fathers. The second is the Part of the Death of the Father. The third is the Part of Years. The fourth is the Part of Inheritances and Possessions. The fifth is the Part of the Nobility of the Native, whether he is the son of him to whom he is assigned or not. The sixth is the Part of the Lord of Things. Albumazar says that the Part of the Father signifies the existence of the father and his nobility and lineage. And if this part is of good essence, the father will be noble. And if the lord of the house of this part is of good essence, the father will be fortunate. But if it is of bad essence, he will be laborious. From the second part of this house, which is the Part of the Death of the Father, the cause of death is taken. As often as the perfection of the year comes to this part or to its lord, it signifies danger to the father. And if any of them come to the significators of the father. The Fifth House. Here are placed the parts of the fifth house, and there are seven. The first is the Part of Children. The second is the Part of the Time in which children should be had. The third is the Part by which masculinity or femininity is known. The fourth is the Part by which it is known concerning the native about whom the question is asked, whether he is male or female. The fifth is the Part to which, when Jupiter comes, it is a signification of a child. The sixth is the Part of the Love of Children. The seventh is the Part of the Knowledge of Children. Albumazar says that if the Part of Children falls in a sign of many children, he will have many children. But if it falls in a sterile sign, he will not have any child. But if it falls in a sign of few children, he will have few children. And if this part signifies children and is fortunate, the children will live. And if unfortunate, they will die. The Sixth House. Here are placed the parts of the sixth house, and there are two. The first is the Part of Azemena, that is, the inseparable debility of some member. The second is the Part of Servants. If the Part of Azemena is conjoined with benefics, the native will be healthy in his members. But if it is conjoined with malefics, he will have inseparable diseases in his members. And the places where these diseases will be are known from the places of the malefics signifying them. Here are placed the parts of the seventh house, and there are four. The first is the Part of the Betrothal of Men. The second is the Part of the Betrothal of Women. And this is taken in two ways. The third is of Delight and Pleasure. The fourth is the Part of Marriages. When the Part of Betrothal comes by direction to Jupiter or Venus, it is a signification of betrothal. And I found in one nativity the time of betrothal when the lord of the Part of Betrothal came to that part by direction, giving one year to each degree. The Eighth House. Here are placed the parts of the eighth house, and there are four. The first is the Part of Death. The second is the Part of the Planet that kills. The third is the Part of the Year in which death or poverty will come to the native. The fourth is the Part of Prevention and Litigation. Here Albumazar says that if the Part of Death is impeded and its lord, and benefics do not aspect them, the native will die a most shameful death. But if benefics aspect them, it will be the opposite. If the Moon or Sun aspects the Part of the Killing Planet, and the Moon itself is in a sign of amputated members, the native will die by suffering. And if the Moon is impeded, something will be cut off from his members. When the Part of the Year in which death is feared for the native and its lord, with the lord of the Ascendant, are impeded, the native will be of many infirmities and affliction in body and substance, and will often approach the loss of body and substance. And as often as the perfection of the year comes to this part, or this part comes by perfection or direction to the Ascendant or to its lord, the native will find dangers in body and infirmities, and will find distress and horror in substance. He will also fear death from various parts. The Ninth House. Here are placed the parts of the ninth house, and there are two. The first is the Part of Peregrination. The second is the Part of Travel by Water. From these are taken the peregrinations of the native and travels by water. Albumazar says: If the Part of Travel by Water falls in an aquatic sign, the native will make many travels by water, and if it is fortunate there, he will have profit and gain in his travels. And if it is unfortunate, it signifies the opposite. The Tenth House. Here are placed the parts of the tenth house, and there are five. The first is the Part of Kings and Kingdom. The second is the Part of the King and Kingdom. The third is the Part of Principalities of the Kingdom. The fourth is the Part signifying whether it is the cause of the kingdom or not. The fifth is the Part of Mothers. The Eleventh House. Here are placed the parts of the eleventh house, and there are two. The first is the Part of Friends. The second is the Part signifying the profit and effect and friendship of friends. Here is placed only one part of the Twelfth House, that of enemies. And these are other parts that the masters of judgments use. Here are placed some other parts that are not in any of the houses, and there are six. The first is the Part of False Rumor. The second is the Part of Reason and Profundity of Sense. The third is the Part of Wisdom and Discipline. The fourth is the Part of War and Battles. The fifth is the Part of Patience. The sixth is the Part of Aspecting in the Revolution of Years. And all these are projected from the Ascendant. And because, with God's help, the author first placed the parts that fall in nativities. Here he places the parts that fall in the revolutions of the years of the world. And it can be divided into two parts: because first he places the parts that the masters of judgments use in revolutions in the causes of kingdoms. And he places the parts that the masters of judgments use in knowing the future of things. The second is there. Also, there are other parts here. He says that from the parts that are exercised in the revolutions of the years of the world to know the causes of the kingdom and empire, and this is taken from Mars to the Moon, and is projected from the Ascendant of the conjunction that signifies the change of the kingdom, and is taken in another way from the degree of the Ascendant of the conjunction to the degree of the conjunction, understanding from the degree of the Ascendant of the revolution of the year to the degree of the conjunction.

title: Introduction to Astrological Judgments

Oſtulata a domino plixitate vite ceypha dala.i.gladij regni z durabilitate ſui bo nozis custodia quoqs operum eius fiue bonorum atqz extenfione ſui inmperijer ordiamur id quod volumus narrare.Cú vidiſſem cóuentum quorundaz antiquos rum ex auctoribus magisterij iudicioz astrozum edidiffe libros quos vocauerút introductorios huius magisterij id estiu diciorum aftrorum:fed quosda ex eis nó fuiffe fcrutatos diligenter vniuerfa que neceffaria funt in eodem magiſterio de bis que conueniunt introductorio. quofdam vero ea que neceſſaria funt protuliffe prolixe:z q2 quod neceffari um eft in eo perijſſe cernerem. Quofdam quoqzin ordinatione eorum que protulerunt no inceſſiſſe itinere difcipline confpexiffem cepi edere hunc lis brum:z pofui eum introductorius.atq3 collegiin eo ex dictis antiquorú qe quid neceffariuz est huic magisterio fecundum modum introductoziŭ: 7 nó introduxi ratiocinationes difputationi fiue defenfionieorum que protuli mus neceffarias cum fint in libro Ptolomei qui appellatur alarbamacalet id eft quattuor tractatuum:7 in lib20 meo quem edidi in confirmatione mas giſterij iudiciorum aftrorum in destructione epiftole baiſſebenbali in an nullatione eius ex ratiocinatione que ad hoc poffint sufficere: 2 diuin eum in quinqs differentias. Prima differentia est in effe circuli fignorum effens tiali z accidentali.Secunda differentia in naturts planetarum feptemiz gd illis proprium:z quid fignificent. Tertia differentia in bis que accidunt pla netis ſeptem in ſemetipfisiz quid accidat eis adinuicem. Quarta differen tia in expoſitione nominum aftrologoum. Quinta differentia in vniuerh tate partium z expofitione effe earúm in gradibus. Differentia pzima. De diuifione circuli figno2uz Itach idest circulus fignoy: diuidikin.xj. ptes equales ſcoz diuifioné circuli figno rú:z bee.xij.ptes dicunt figna z referunt ad imagines & funt fub eodé zodiaco cir culo: funt Aries Taurus Semini Lácer Leo Virgo Libra Scorpius Sagittarius Lapcomus Aõrius Pifces. Et vnúquods 93 istor ſignoy diuidit in.xxx.ptes eles: gradus vocant.Et gradus diuidit i.lr. minuta:z minuti in.lx.scdarz ſcozi. lx.ter tia.Silr & fequunt quarta..z guta afcen dédo vias ad infiniſta. Et ſex ex bis ſignis funt ſeptétrionalia.i. ab initio arietis vios in finem virginis a ſunt ſeptétrionalia a li nea egnoctiali: z fex meridiana.i.ab initio libre vsqz in fine pisciű. Et ſex ex illis dicút Directe aſcédétia ideft ab initio cancri vsqz i fine fagittarij. Et fer totuose afce dentia dicunt.i.ab initio capricorni vlog in fine geminor. Et toituoſe aſcédé tía obediút directe afcédétibus:hoc é:duo figna q fuerint vnius lõgitudis a capite căcri obediűt fibi vt gemini cácro. Zaurus leoni Aries virgini. Et pi ſces libre aqrius ſcorpioni. Et capricornus ſagittario. Et duo figna fue rit vnius lõgitudis a capite arietis dicunt acordatia in itinere vt aries 7 pi ſces. Laurus z ağrius. Kemini z capcom.Lacer z ſagittari. Leo a ſcorpios Uirgo z libra. Et vocat medietas circuli é ab initio leonis vſqz i fine cap comi medietas maxia:z é medietas ſolis:qr ſol in oi bac medietate b3 princi piú ficuti bit plaete i ſuis terminis. Et alia medietas qé ab initio aqrij vſqς in finé cácri vocat minima:z eſt medietas lune:q2 lúa fikr bz in oi bac medie tate incipiú ficut ſol in maria a vocat illa medietas q est ab initio ariet viqs in finē virginis medietas calida:z alia q est ab initio libre vſqz in finé piſciuz vocať medietas frigida. Et vocaf illa ärta po circuli que est ab initio Ariets viqß in finé geminoy quarta calida búida vernalis puerilis ſanguinea. Et il la q é ab initio cácri viqz in finé virginis di örta calida ficca estiualis iuueni lis colerica. Et illa q est ab initio libre vios in finez ſagittarij di ärta frigida Acca autúnalis melacholica:z ſignificat initiuz diminutióis mediocris etats. Et illa qest ab initio capricorni vsqz in finé piſciú di ärta frigida buída defe ctiua fenilis byemalis flatica. Oibus át plactis q ferunt in bis fignis non g fint in eis:fed qa ferunt fub eis hoc é indirecto eop. Altior 7 ppios circulo fi gnozu z curſu tardior eft Saturnus:deinde Jupiter.deinde Mars.deinde Sol.deinde Uenus.deinde Mercurius. deinde Luna que est terre ppios 7. curſu oibus velocior. Significatur auté etiam per caput draconis z caudam cú planetis quedaz fignificatiões ficut exponemus in ſequétibus. De domibus planetarum. Abent quos planete in bis ſignis poteftates:quafdam p naturá quaſdá per accidés. Que sút p natură sunt bee domus. Exalta a tio. Lerminus. Triplicitas.Facies.Deillis autem que per accidens funt los co conuenienti tractabimus. (Domus funt bee Aries a Scorpius.domus Martis Taurus z libra.domus Ueneris.Semini z virgo.domus Mercu rij Cácer.domus Lune Leo.dom? Solis.Sagittarius z pifces.domus Jo uis.Capricornus Aquarius.domus Saturni. Septimú autem fignum a do mo vniufcuiufqz planete dicitur eiufdem fore detrimentum.Et fi duo figna fuerint domus vnius planete:dicuntur concordantiain almantica:boc est in circulo qui latus est in medio z in ligatura ftrictus: babet fignificare cir culum zodiacu.Signa autem in que planete dum intrant dicuntur gratu lari in eis z domini eorum fecundum dorothiaz ſunt bec.Saturnus dum in trat aquarius gaudere dicitur Jupiter in ſagittario. Mars in ſcorpione. Ue nus in Lauro: 7 Mercurius in Girgine. De exaltationibus planetarum. E funt exaltationes planetarum.Sol exaltatur in ariete:boc est in.xviij.gradu eius.Luna in.iij.gradu. Lauri Saturnus in.xxi. libre. Jupiter in.xv.gradu Lacri.Mars in.xxviij.gradu Capricor ni.Uenus in.xxvij.gradu pifcium. Mercurius in.xv.Uirginis Caput draconis in.iij.gradu geminor. Et cauda in.iij.gradu Sagittarij.In feptimo autem figno ab exaltatióe vniufcuiufos planete:in fimili gradu erit eius defcéfio:kbi gratia:ficut fol exaltat in.xviij.gradu arietis.ita i.xviiij.gra du libre cadit:z fic de ceteris. Ptolomeus aurez ponit arietem totum exaltas tionen folis.Et thaurum totum exaltationem Lune z cetera fimiliter. De triplicitatibus. Riplicitates vero fic distinguimus. Dia enim tria ligna que in vna natura videntur concordari faciunt triplicitatem z eodem nomine vocantur.boc est triplicitas. Aries ergo Leo z ſagittari us faciunt triplicitatem primam:quia vnúquodos istorum figno rum eſt igneum mafculinum.diurnum calidum.f.z ficcum colericum:fapo re amarum.est quoqz z hec triplicitas orientalis.Luius domini funt in die fol z in nocte Jupiter z eop particeps in die ac nocte eſt ſaturnus Impli citas fecunda eft ex Lauro virgie z capricomo: quia bec fút figna feminina nocturna terrea frigida.f.r ficca melácolica fapore acria meridiana. Chu ius quoqs triplicitatis domini funt in die Uenus z nocte luna quarus parti ceps i die acnocte é Mars. Lertia triplicitas eft ex geminis libra z aqua rio:quia bec figna fút mafculina diurna fanguinea.f.calida bumida aerea ſa pore dulcia occidentalia. Cuius triplicitatis domini funt in die Saturnus 7 in nocte Mercurius:cord quos pticeps i die ac nocte eft Jupiter. Quar taz vero triplicitatem faciunt Cancer Scorpius z pifces:quia bec funt femi nina nocturna feptentrionalia aquatica flatica frigida humida ſapore falfa. Luius triplicitatis domini funt in die
translation: Alchabitius with commentary. With grace and privilege. Horizon B 8 II circular. Circle of Cancer. Equinoctial. Circle of Capricorn. Circle of Antarctic. Zenith oblique. The Isagogic Book of Abdilazi, that is, the servant of the glorious God, who is called Alchabitius, for the mastery of astrological judgments, interpreted by John of Seville, and a commentary on the same by John of Saxony, connected in a useful series, begin. Having sought from the Lord the longevity of Cephas Dala, that is, the sword of the kingdom and the durability of his honor, and also the custody of his works, whether good or bad, and the extension of his empire, let us begin what we wish to narrate. When I saw that some ancient authors of the mastery of astrological judgments had published books which they called introductory to this mastery, that is, of astrological judgments, but some of them had not diligently investigated all that is necessary in the same mastery concerning those things which are suitable for an introduction. And some indeed had presented what is necessary at length, and because I perceived that what is necessary in it had perished. And also, when I observed that some had not proceeded in the path of discipline in the arrangement of what they presented, I began to publish this book, and I made it an introduction. And I collected in it from the sayings of the ancients whatever is necessary for this mastery according to the introductory method, and I did not introduce the reasonings of disputation or defense of what we presented as necessary, since they are in Ptolemy's book which is called Alarbamacalet, that is, of four treatises, and in my book which I published in confirmation of the mastery of astrological judgments in the destruction of the epistle of Baissibenbali, in its annulment by reasoning which can suffice for this. And I divided it into five differences. The first difference is in the essential and accidental being of the circle of signs. The second difference is in the natures of the seven planets, what is proper to them, and what they signify. The third difference is in those things which happen to the seven planets in themselves, and what happens to them mutually. The fourth difference is in the exposition of astrological names. The fifth difference is in the universality of the parts and the exposition of their being in degrees. First difference. Concerning the division of the circle of signs. The zodiac, that is, the circle of signs, is divided into twelve equal parts according to the division of the circle of signs. And these twelve parts are called signs and refer to the images which are under the same zodiacal circle. They are Aries, Taurus, Gemini, Cancer, Leo, Virgo, Libra, Scorpio, Sagittarius, Capricorn, Aquarius, Pisces. And each of these signs is divided into thirty equal parts, called degrees. And a degree is divided into sixty minutes, and minutes into sixty seconds, and seconds into sixty thirds. Similarly, fourths and fifths follow, ascending to infinity. And six of these signs are northern, that is, from the beginning of Aries to the end of Virgo, and they are northern from the equinoctial line. And six are southern, that is, from the beginning of Libra to the end of Pisces. And six of them are called direct ascending, that is, from the beginning of Cancer to the end of Sagittarius. And six are called tortuous ascending, that is, from the beginning of Capricorn to the end of Gemini. And the tortuous ascending signs obey the direct ascending signs. That is, two signs which are of the same longitude from the head of Cancer obey each other, such as Gemini to Cancer, Taurus to Leo, Aries to Virgo. And Pisces to Libra, Aquarius to Scorpio, and Capricorn to Sagittarius. And two signs which are of the same longitude from the head of Aries are said to be in agreement in their path, such as Aries and Pisces, Taurus and Aquarius, Gemini and Capricorn, Cancer and Sagittarius, Leo and Scorpio, Virgo and Libra. And the half of the circle from the beginning of Leo to the end of Capricorn is called the greater half, and it is the half of the Sun, because the Sun has principality in all this half, just as the planets have in their terms. And the other half, which is from the beginning of Aquarius to the end of Cancer, is called the lesser half, and it is the half of the Moon, because the Moon similarly has principality in all this half, just as the Sun in the greater half. And that half which is from the beginning of Aries to the end of Virgo is called the hot half. And the other, which is from the beginning of Libra to the end of Pisces, is called the cold half. And that fourth part of the circle which is from the beginning of Aries to the end of Gemini is called the hot, humid, vernal, youthful, sanguine quarter. And that which is from the beginning of Cancer to the end of Virgo is called the hot, dry, aestival, adolescent, choleric quarter. And that which is from the beginning of Libra to the end of Sagittarius is called the cold, dry, autumnal, melancholic quarter, and it signifies the beginning of the diminution of middle age. And that which is from the beginning of Capricorn to the end of Pisces is called the cold, humid, defective, senile, hibernal, phlegmatic quarter. All the planets which are carried in these signs are not in them, but because they are carried under them, that is, in their direction. Higher and closer to the circle of signs and slower in course is Saturn, then Jupiter, then Mars, then the Sun, then Venus, then Mercury, then the Moon, which is closer to the Earth and faster in course than all. Certain significations are also indicated by the head of the Dragon and the tail with the planets, as we will explain in the following. Concerning the houses of the planets. The planets have powers in these signs, some by nature, some by accident. Those which are by nature are these: houses, exaltation, term, triplicity, face. We will treat of those which are by accident in a suitable place. The houses are these: Aries and Scorpio, house of Mars. Taurus and Libra, house of Venus. Gemini and Virgo, house of Mercury. Cancer, house of the Moon. Leo, house of the Sun. Sagittarius and Pisces, house of Jupiter. Capricorn and Aquarius, house of Saturn. The seventh sign from the house of each planet is said to be its detriment. And if two signs are the house of one planet, they are said to be in agreement in the almantica, that is, in the circle which is wide in the middle and narrow at the ligature, it signifies the zodiacal circle. The signs in which the planets are said to rejoice when they enter, and their lords according to Dorotheus, are these: Saturn is said to rejoice when he enters Aquarius. Jupiter in Sagittarius. Mars in Scorpio. Venus in Taurus. And Mercury in Virgo. Concerning the exaltations of the planets. These are the exaltations of the planets: The Sun is exalted in Aries, that is, in its 18th degree. The Moon in the 3rd degree of Taurus. Saturn in the 21st of Libra. Jupiter in the 15th degree of Cancer. Mars in the 28th degree of Capricorn. Venus in the 27th degree of Pisces. Mercury in the 15th of Virgo. The Head of the Dragon in the 3rd degree of Gemini. And the Tail in the 3rd degree of Sagittarius. In the seventh sign from the exaltation of each planet, in a similar degree will be its fall. For example, just as the Sun is exalted in the 18th degree of Aries, so it falls in the 18th degree of Libra, and so for the others. Ptolemy, however, places the whole of Aries as the exaltation of the Sun. And the whole of Taurus as the exaltation of the Moon, and so on for the others. Concerning triplicities. We distinguish triplicities thus: Three signs which appear to agree in one nature form a triplicity and are called by the same name, that is, triplicity. Therefore, Aries, Leo, and Sagittarius form the first triplicity, because each of these signs is fiery, masculine, diurnal, hot, and dry, choleric, bitter in taste. This triplicity is also oriental. Its lords are the Sun by day and Jupiter by night, and their participant by day and night is Saturn. The second triplicity is from Taurus, Virgo, and Capricorn, because these are feminine, nocturnal, earthy, cold, and dry, melancholic, acrid in taste, southern signs. The lords of this triplicity are Venus by day and the Moon by night, whose participant by day and night is Mars. The third triplicity is from Gemini, Libra, and Aquarius, because these signs are masculine, diurnal, sanguine, hot, humid, airy, sweet in taste, western. The lords of this triplicity are Saturn by day and Mercury by night, among whom Jupiter is the participant by day and night. The fourth triplicity is formed by Cancer, Scorpio, and Pisces, because these are feminine, nocturnal, northern, watery, phlegmatic, cold, humid, salty in taste. The lords of this triplicity are by day...

De faciebus fignoy a cui planetarum attribútur. Acies aut fignop sunt be: vnquoqz ſignuz diuidit in tres partes equales:quelibet pars conflat ex.r.gradibus 7 vocatur facies q rum initium eft a primo gradu arietis. Prima ergo facies est a p mo gradu arietis vsqz in.x.z datur Marti. Secunda uſqz ad.xx. gradu3.2 datur Soli qui fuccedit ei in ordine circulorum. Tertia vios ad fis nem pdicti figni.z eft Generis:fimiliter prima facies Lauri est Mercurii gueneri fuccedit:z ita vſqz in finem fignowz. Lumigitur habueris gra dum in aliquo figno 7 volueris fire ex cuius planetarum facie fit:fume ab initio arietis figna integra vſqz ad fignuz de quo volueris fcire z triplica са 7 quod fupfuerit adde fuper hoc qo preterijt ex faciebus illius figni de quo faciem fcire volueris cum cadem facie cuius dim fcire volueris 7 proijce a planeta qui est vominus faciei figni arietis qui est Mars ſcom fucceffioez circulorum.7.2.7.2 q8 remaferit infra ſeptem numera a Marte p fucceffio nem planetarum': z quo finitus fuerit numerus erit prima facies illius fi gni vnde fuerit gradus vfqsi.io.eiufdé figni illius planete apud quem nu merus erit finitus:za.x.vfcsin.xx.alterius planete qui illum fuccedit:za.xx. vios in finez alterius figni qui ei fucceditiz in cuius decimo fuerit gradus ex figno erit facies illius planete.vocatur r etiam domini facierum iftarum a ge bufdam decani cuius fequitur tabula. I qr iam annuente deo tractauimus de poteftatibus planctax in fignis a fut domus exaltatio triplicitas termivo z facies. Núc igitur tractemus de virtutib ſen fortitudinibus cop in ipfis.nă dins domus 13.5.fortitudines: 7 dominus exal. 4.7 dns tripli. 3.dns termini duasiz dñs faciei vná. Intellige ergo ex 15 nume, anj ro fortitudines planetax.q.n.magis abundant in numero magis abúdant in fortitudine:7 qdam pponit terminu triplicitati.i.volút vt dis termini fit fotiordno triplicitatis:fed iam erpofuimus fupius in quo valet vnusgras. Quidam ét de hac re tale dederit cóparationem dicétes qo planeta cu fue rit in domo sua est fimilis viro in domo atqz in dominate fua:z cum fuerit in exaltatióe ſua eſt ſimilis viro i regnoſuo z gloria:7 cum fuerit in termino ſuo eft sicut vir inter parétes 7 cognatos fuos atos gétes:z cum fuerit in tri plicitate fua erit ficut vir in honore fuo:z iter auxiliatores atos mistros fuos z cú fuerit in facie ſua erit sicut vir in magiſterio fuo. De fút vniuerse poteſta tes planetarum:effentiales in fignis z ſequütur bas figure fignorum. De effentys fignorum z gd fignificent in femetipfis. Uia in fignis funt adam figna q dicunt rénalia.f. Uirgo Bemis ni Libra z Aquarir pma medietas Sagittary qr eox imagines in circulo ad imagines hoium figurantbec quos dicunt figna pulcbras voces babétia bec quos vigent cu fuerint in ouete. Et daz dicunt alas babētia.f.Semini Uirgo z pifces. Et adá ądrupedia:vt Leor Sagittarius. Queda cop funt domestica:vt Aries Tau rus Lapricomus:7 bec vigét cú fuerint in meridie. Uirgo aût z Lapricon? 7 Aquarius vigét cú fuerint in Septētriones. Et ex fignis ādam für totuo fa z vitiofa.l.Aries Taurus Lancer Scorpio z Lapricornus. Et qdaz ex eis dicunt plures proles bitia.f.Cancer Scorpio z Pifces. Et bec vigét cú fue rint in occidere. Et qdam ex eis funt sterilia:vt Bemini Leo Uirgo. Et qdá funt paucos filios bitia:vt Aries Taurus Libra Sagittarius Capricomus z Aquarius. Et dam dicūtur multú luxuriofa.f.Aries Taurus Leor Lap comus. Et ex fignis adam dicunt media voce bitia a formant ad imagies aialium balatium z mugiétium z rugiétium:ut Aries Taurus Leor Lapi conus:z vltima pars ſagittarij. Et qdas funt voce carétia.filla q formant ad imagines aialium voce carentium.f.Cancer Scorpius z pifces. De fignificationibus fignorum. Z vnúquodqs ſignibz ppia fignificatoes in bis & fignificant ex creative membrop z mozib boium z regionú z ſeminů z arború 7 cetera. Aries bz ex coupe bois caput z facie z ex regiõib bebil:z feriz.i.babilonta z pridem z arabiá z falaſtim z palestina. Laurus bz arbores a plantant:z ex coupe bois b3 collű z guturis nodú:z exregióis bus ezetimet z almechim z ſandé zaraterad. Bemini eſt ſignú largū boni ai 2 hz ex coupe bois bumeros z brachia z manus:z ex regiõib vigeti z armes nia nutbrabigé etelenimſtet.i.egyptú etbartha.Lancer bz ex arbozub eas q fuerint eğles lögitudie:7 ex coupe bois pectus corftomachi coſtas ſplene 7 pulmoné z ex regiõib armenia minoré z oriétalé plagá buthabe z maſſez 7 acin:z b3 pticipatióezin barach z atrabicen. Leo bzarbores pceras.i.lons gas calidus z verſutus:z multe angustie ats trifticie:7 ex coupe bois ſtoma chú cor dofum latus z ex regiõib artitri usos in finé regionis habitabilis. Uirgo bz qcqd feminat ex feminibor eft larga boni ai:z bzer coupe bois vê trem z interiora.f.telam.i.dyafragma z inteſtina: z ex regionib arguméta z Bum moga agility Libr affem idest quedam regio circa bierusalem z alforas idest eufraten z infula que biſpania z festiruel afeum.Libra habet arbores preras z est larga bos ni animi:z babet ex corpore hominis lumbos zinferiora ventris vmbilicuz 7 pectinem z verenda anchas 7 ilia 7 nates: 7 ex regionibus terram roma nozum vel grecomm z que fuccedunt eis affines vfque ad Africam: babet etiam araffe vel azim vſqz in finem ethiopie z bartban:babet z carmen z fes gestem z thebis uel thebil z tabraſten barab 7 ambarath.Scorpius habet arbores longitudine equales largus boni animi z babet exbominis corpo re verenda teſticulos veficam anum z femora z ex regionibus belebiget? rura Arabum z fines eius vsqz in allegem:z babet in alcbach participatios nem.Sagittarius ingeniofus a calidus babet ex corpore hominis femora: 7 ex regionibus ethiopiam z mabaraben z achiut vel acenit vel achichit q est india. Capricornus bone vite iracundus cautus 7 calidus:multe trifticie babens ex corpore ſe hominis genua:z ex regiõibus ethiopia annaban al con z acuith z mabamen vſqz ad duo maria etabant z achuit que est india. Aquarius babet ex corpore hominis crura vios ad inferiora cauillarum ida est tallorum z ex regionibus azenes idest nigredinem zalthupha z partes eins z terram elfies 7 partem terre egypti z occidétales plaga z terre achi ut. Pisces calidus z cautus commixtus multi coloris babés ex corpore bo minis pedes: regionibus carabzarem z ſeptétrionalem plagam terreiur gem 7 participationem in romanis vios ad effen babet inſulam z egyptum 7 alexandriam z mare licium. author: Alchabitius
title: Direction of Significators
text: 2 admodú ondi tibidirectione ab angulo z iunges vtrafes directióis. As cum fciueris fignificatoreni z volueris ſcire quo perueniet directio de cir culo fignonum in aliquo annorum fuerites fignificator in afcendéte:addes numerum annorum:fuper afcenfiones gradus afcendétisiz facies eum ar cum in afcenfione regionis:7 quo exiuerit arcus grad.de circulo fignorum ibi perueniet directio in eodem anno.Si vero fuerit fignificatorin.7.addes numerum annorum fuper afcenfiones nadir gradus fignificatoris:z arcuas bis cum etiam in afcenfionibus regionis:7 & exierit de circulo fignorum:ad eius nadir perueniet directio eodez anno. CQd fi fuerit fignificator in. 10. vel.4.addes fuper afcenfiones grad.fignificatoris in circulo directo nume rum annorum:z arcuabis eum in afcenfionibus circuli directi:z y exierit & circulo fignorú ibidem perueniet in eodem anno directio. Si vero fuerit fignificator extra bec quattuor loca que funt anguli ſcias horas longitudis nis ab angulo ficut predixi:quod fifuerit fignificator in medietate ouentali: addes ſuper afcenfiones gra.fignificatoris per circulum directum numerú annorum quos voluerio 7 arcuabis hoc in afcenfionibus circuli directi: z quod exierit erit fignificatos circuli directi:ferua eum.post hoc addes nume rum annorum etiam fuper afcenfiones grad.fignificatous in regione:z ars cuabis boc in afcenfione regionis:z q fuerit exit fignificatoz regionis.poft bocaccipies ſextam partem refidui inter fignificatorem circuli directi: z fi gnificatorem regionis:z multiplicabis eam in bozis longitudinis ab angu. lo z qo fuerit erit equatio. Quod fi fuerit fignificator circuli directi minoz fignificatore regionis addes equationem ſuper ſignificatorum circuli dire crisz si fuerit plus minues eam de eo:rz premáferit ibi perueniet directio ex circulo fignorum eodem anno. Qo fi fuerit fignificator in medietate ocu cidentali facies cum nadir gras.fignificatoris ficut fecifti cum gradu figni ficatoris in opere qe est ante euz:z quod fuerit ibidem perueniet directio ex circulo fignorum in eodem annoiz locus ad quem perueniet directio dicis tur locus diuifionis z dominus termini illius loci dicitur diuifong si fuerit in gradu diuifionis planeta alius aut radij eins aut prope locum ante eum Dicitur bic planeta aut dominus radiozum particeps diuiforis in diuifione. Significatores quoqz qui dirigunt funt quinqs loca.i.grad.afcendentis: gra.Solis z gra. Lune gra.quos partis fortune ac gradus medij celi.Bras dus nácz afcendentis dirigitur ad accidentia dignofcenda que acciduntin corporeiz gra.folis ad dignitatis zexaltatióis caufas:honoris quos atqz regni:z Luna propter effe anime a corporis ats coniugij:z pars fonune ps pter acquifitiones 7 profectus exiguitatem z largitatem z medium celipzo pter magiſterium z ceteras difpofitiones particulares z effe cop. Si auté fuerit afcendens revolutionis alicuius annorum mundi vel nativitatum of riguntur fignificatores eins fecúdum banc directioné vnicuiqs ſcilicet gras dui diem vnum. Quibufdam uidetur vt dirigantur fignificatores anni boc modo omnibus:fcilicet.59.minutio:7.8 fecundis vnum diem: nam directio regum z principum fic dirigitur eis a gradu medij celi per afcenfiones cir, culi directi omnibus.56.minutis; octo ſecundis vnum dien donec perues niat ad bonos vel malos planetas. Et dirigitur effe regum in incolumita te: aut infirmitate ex gradu afcendentis ad bonos vel malos planetas om nibus.59.minutis: octo fecundis diem vnum per afcenfiones regionis: directio i revolutióe annorum mundi z prenoſcendum effe vulgi vel rusti comm a gradu afcendentis:fimiliter zad prenoſcédum effe regis a gradu medij celi:z in reuolutione annorum natiuitatum ad prenoſcendum effe na ti a gradu afcendentis revolutionis omnibus.59.minutis z octo fecundis per aſcenſiones regionis diem vnum. De algebugthar. Lex hoc fequitur algebugtbar in natiuitatibus zé directio gra dus afcendentis: hoc elt vt afpicias gradum afcendentis in ter mino cuius fit planete z minuas afcenfiones afcendentis de afcé Honibus que sunt indirecto finis termini planete per afcenfiones. regionis: o remanferit accipies vnicuics gradui vnum annum z omnibus quinqs minutis menfemiz omni minuto.6.dies z erit dominus termini difpofitoi annorum quid dicitur diuifor. Poft hoc accipies gradus termini qui eum fuccedit 7 vertes eos etiam in gra.afcenfionum z fuerit accipies vnicuics gradui annum vnum:z omnibus.5. minutis mélem z om ni minuto ſex dies:eritqz dominus termini diuifor a difpofitor illorú annos rū. Similiter intrabis cum omni termino domini per ſucceſſionem vios in finem vitez fi fuerit in termino alicuius planete:planeta aut radij eius erüt participes in diuifione: z bec diuifio dicitur algebugtbar. Ө De duodenarijs planetarum z domowm. Lex boc duodenarie planetarum aut domorum:hoc eft vt afpicias quatum ambulauerit planeta in figno ſuo in quocuqs fuerit aut gra. domus quévolueris ex gradibus z minutis multiplicabiſqz boc in. i2.poft hoc addes defuper ipfos gra.ates minuta que multiplicaſti in.12.7 collectum fuerit ex eo proijce ab initio gra.ciufdem ſigni dans vnicuiqz figno.30.gra.z quo fuerit finitus numerusibi erit duodenaria planetarum ac domosum. De nouenariis eorúdem. Lex hoc amanbabarat que funt nouéarie. Luius ſcientia eft vt ſcias quantum ambulauerit planeta in figno ſuo ex gradibus z minutis: aut grad. domus cuius volueris fcire nouenariu.poft boc diuide fignum in noué diuiſfides z vnaques diuifio eft ex tri bus gradibus ztertia parte vnius gradus. Poft hoc afpicies in quo nouenario ex nouenarijs ceciderit gradus planete aut dom. Poft boc dabis primum nouenarium ex fignis domino ſigni mobilis eiufdez tris plicitatis 7 fecundum nouenarium domino figni cuius est ipfum fignum C
translation: When you know the significator and wish to know where the direction will arrive from the circle of signs in a certain number of years, if the significator is in the ascendant, add the number of years to the ascensions of the degree of the ascendant, and make that arc in the ascensions of the region. Where the arc of degrees from the circle of signs ends, there the direction will arrive in that same year. If the significator is in the 7th house, add the number of years to the ascensions of the nadir of the significator's degree, and arc this also in the ascensions of the region. Where it ends from the circle of signs, the direction will arrive at its nadir in the same year. If the significator is in the 10th or 4th house, add the number of years to the ascensions of the significator's degree in the direct circle, and arc it in the ascensions of the direct circle. Where it ends from the circle of signs, there the direction will arrive in the same year. If the significator is outside these four places, which are the angles, you must know the hours of longitude from the angle as I said before. If the significator is in the eastern half, add the number of years you wish to the ascensions of the significator's degree through the direct circle, and arc this in the ascensions of the direct circle. What results will be the significator of the direct circle; keep it. After this, add the number of years also to the ascensions of the significator's degree in the region, and arc this in the ascensions of the region. What results will be the significator of the region. After this, take the sixth part of the remainder between the significator of the direct circle and the significator of the region, and multiply it by the hours of longitude from the angle. What results will be the equation. If the significator of the direct circle is less than the significator of the region, add the equation to the significator of the direct circle. If it is more, subtract it from it. What remains there is where the direction will arrive from the circle of signs in the same year. If the significator is in the western half, do with the nadir of the significator's degree as you did with the significator's degree in the operation before it. What results there is where the direction will arrive from the circle of signs in the same year. The place to which the direction arrives is called the place of division, and the lord of the term of that place is called the divisor. If another planet or its rays or a place near it is in the degree of division, this planet or the lord of the rays is said to be a participant of the divisor in the division. The significators that are directed are five places: the degree of the ascendant, the degree of the Sun, the degree of the Moon, the degree of the Part of Fortune, and the degree of the Midheaven. The degree of the ascendant is directed to discern accidents that happen to the body. The degree of the Sun is for causes of dignity and exaltation, honor, and kingdom. The Moon is for the being of the soul and body and marriage. The Part of Fortune is for acquisitions and progress, scarcity and abundance. The Midheaven is for mastery and other particular dispositions and their being. If the ascendant of a revolution of any world years or nativities is directed, its significators are directed according to this direction, namely, one day for each degree. Some believe that the significators of the year are directed in this way for all: namely, 59 minutes and 8 seconds for one day. For the direction of kings and princes is directed to them from the degree of the Midheaven through the ascensions of the direct circle, 56 minutes and 8 seconds for one day, until it reaches good or bad planets. And the being of kings in health or illness is directed from the degree of the ascendant to good or bad planets, 59 minutes and 8 seconds for one day through the ascensions of the region. The direction in the revolution of world years and to predict the being of the common people or rustics is from the degree of the ascendant, similarly to predict the being of the king from the degree of the Midheaven. And in the revolution of nativity years, to predict the being of the native from the degree of the ascendant of the revolution, 59 minutes and 8 seconds for one day through the ascensions of the region. Concerning Algebugthar. The law of Algebugthar in nativities is the direction of the degree of the ascendant. This means that you look at the degree of the ascendant in whose term it is, and subtract the ascensions of the ascendant from the ascensions that are in the direct end of the planet's term through the ascensions of the region. For what remains, you take one year for each degree, and one month for every five minutes, and 6 days for every minute. The lord of the term will be the disposer of the years, which is called the divisor. After this, take the degrees of the term that succeeds it, and convert them also into degrees of ascensions. For what results, take one year for each degree, and one month for every 5 minutes, and six days for every minute. The lord of the term will be the divisor and disposer of those years. Similarly, you will enter with every term of the lord by succession until the end of life. If it is in the term of any planet, the planet or its rays will be participants in the division. This division is called Algebugthar. Concerning the Duodenaries of Planets and Houses. The law of the duodenaries of planets or houses means that you look at how much the planet has moved in its sign, in whatever sign it is, or the degree of the house you wish, in degrees and minutes. You will multiply this by 12. After this, add to it the degrees and minutes that you multiplied by 12. What is collected from it, project from the beginning of the degree of the same sign, giving 30 degrees to each sign. Where the number ends, there will be the duodenary of the planets and houses. Concerning their Novenaries. The law of Amanbabarat, which are the novenaries. The knowledge of this is to know how much the planet has moved in its sign in degrees and minutes, or the degree of the house whose novenary you wish to know. After this, divide the sign into nine divisions, and each division is three degrees and a third part of one degree. After this, look in which novenary out of the novenaries the degree of the planet or house falls. After this, give the first novenary from the signs to the lord of the movable sign of the same triplicity, and the second novenary to the lord of the sign of which it is itself.

title: On the Terms of the Planets

De faciebus fignoy a cui planetarum attribútur. Acies aut fignop sunt be: vnquoqz ſignuz diuidit in tres partes equales:quelibet pars conflat ex.r.gradibus 7 vocatur facies q rum initium eft a primo gradu arietis. Prima ergo facies est a p mo gradu arietis vsqz in.x.z datur Marti. Secunda uſqz ad.xx. gradu3.2 datur Soli qui fuccedit ei in ordine circulorum. Tertia vios ad fis nem pdicti figni.z eft Generis:fimiliter prima facies Lauri est Mercurii gueneri fuccedit:z ita vſqz in finem fignowz. Lumigitur habueris gra dum in aliquo figno 7 volueris fire ex cuius planetarum facie fit:fume ab initio arietis figna integra vſqz ad fignuz de quo volueris fcire z triplica са 7 quod fupfuerit adde fuper hoc qo preterijt ex faciebus illius figni de quo faciem fcire volueris cum cadem facie cuius dim fcire volueris 7 proijce a planeta qui est vominus faciei figni arietis qui est Mars ſcom fucceffioez circulorum.7.2.7.2 q8 remaferit infra ſeptem numera a Marte p fucceffio nem planetarum': z quo finitus fuerit numerus erit prima facies illius fi gni vnde fuerit gradus vfqsi.io.eiufdé figni illius planete apud quem nu merus erit finitus:za.x.vfcsin.xx.alterius planete qui illum fuccedit:za.xx. vios in finez alterius figni qui ei fucceditiz in cuius decimo fuerit gradus ex figno erit facies illius planete.vocatur r etiam domini facierum iftarum a ge bufdam decani cuius fequitur tabula. I qr iam annuente deo tractauimus de poteftatibus planctax in fignis a fut domus exaltatio triplicitas termivo z facies. Núc igitur tractemus de virtutib ſen fortitudinibus cop in ipfis.nă dins domus 13.5.fortitudines: 7 dominus exal. 4.7 dns tripli. 3.dns termini duasiz dñs faciei vná. Intellige ergo ex 15 nume, anj ro fortitudines planetax.q.n.magis abundant in numero magis abúdant in fortitudine:7 qdam pponit terminu triplicitati.i.volút vt dis termini fit fotiordno triplicitatis:fed iam erpofuimus fupius in quo valet vnusgras. Quidam ét de hac re tale dederit cóparationem dicétes qo planeta cu fue rit in domo sua est fimilis viro in domo atqz in dominate fua:z cum fuerit in exaltatióe ſua eſt ſimilis viro i regnoſuo z gloria:7 cum fuerit in termino ſuo eft sicut vir inter parétes 7 cognatos fuos atos gétes:z cum fuerit in tri plicitate fua erit ficut vir in honore fuo:z iter auxiliatores atos mistros fuos z cú fuerit in facie ſua erit sicut vir in magiſterio fuo. De fút vniuerse poteſta tes planetarum:effentiales in fignis z ſequütur bas figure fignorum. De effentys fignorum z gd fignificent in femetipfis. Uia in fignis funt adam figna q dicunt rénalia.f. Uirgo Bemis ni Libra z Aquarir pma medietas Sagittary qr eox imagines in circulo ad imagines hoium figurantbec quos dicunt figna pulcbras voces babétia bec quos vigent cu fuerint in ouete. Et daz dicunt alas babētia.f.Semini Uirgo z pifces. Et adá ądrupedia:vt Leor Sagittarius. Queda cop funt domestica:vt Aries Tau rus Lapricomus:7 bec vigét cú fuerint in meridie. Uirgo aût z Lapricon? 7 Aquarius vigét cú fuerint in Septētriones. Et ex fignis ādam für totuo fa z vitiofa.l.Aries Taurus Lancer Scorpio z Lapricornus. Et qdaz ex eis dicunt plures proles bitia.f.Cancer Scorpio z Pifces. Et bec vigét cú fue rint in occidere. Et qdam ex eis funt sterilia:vt Bemini Leo Uirgo. Et qdá funt paucos filios bitia:vt Aries Taurus Libra Sagittarius Capricomus z Aquarius. Et dam dicūtur multú luxuriofa.f.Aries Taurus Leor Lap comus. Et ex fignis adam dicunt media voce bitia a formant ad imagies aialium balatium z mugiétium z rugiétium:ut Aries Taurus Leor Lapi conus:z vltima pars ſagittarij. Et qdas funt voce carétia.filla q formant ad imagines aialium voce carentium.f.Cancer Scorpius z pifces. De fignificationibus fignorum. Z vnúquodqs ſignibz ppia fignificatoes in bis & fignificant ex creative membrop z mozib boium z regionú z ſeminů z arború 7 cetera. Aries bz ex coupe bois caput z facie z ex regiõib bebil:z feriz.i.babilonta z pridem z arabiá z falaſtim z palestina. Laurus bz arbores a plantant:z ex coupe bois b3 collű z guturis nodú:z exregióis bus ezetimet z almechim z ſandé zaraterad. Bemini eſt ſignú largū boni ai 2 hz ex coupe bois bumeros z brachia z manus:z ex regiõib vigeti z armes nia nutbrabigé etelenimſtet.i.egyptú etbartha.Lancer bz ex arbozub eas q fuerint eğles lögitudie:7 ex coupe bois pectus corftomachi coſtas ſplene 7 pulmoné z ex regiõib armenia minoré z oriétalé plagá buthabe z maſſez 7 acin:z b3 pticipatióezin barach z atrabicen. Leo bzarbores pceras.i.lons gas calidus z verſutus:z multe angustie ats trifticie:7 ex coupe bois ſtoma chú cor dofum latus z ex regiõib artitri usos in finé regionis habitabilis. Uirgo bz qcqd feminat ex feminibor eft larga boni ai:z bzer coupe bois vê trem z interiora.f.telam.i.dyafragma z inteſtina: z ex regionib arguméta z Bum moga agility Libr affem idest quedam regio circa bierusalem z alforas idest eufraten z infula que biſpania z festiruel afeum.Libra habet arbores preras z est larga bos ni animi:z babet ex corpore hominis lumbos zinferiora ventris vmbilicuz 7 pectinem z verenda anchas 7 ilia 7 nates: 7 ex regionibus terram roma nozum vel grecomm z que fuccedunt eis affines vfque ad Africam: babet etiam araffe vel azim vſqz in finem ethiopie z bartban:babet z carmen z fes gestem z thebis uel thebil z tabraſten barab 7 ambarath.Scorpius habet arbores longitudine equales largus boni animi z babet exbominis corpo re verenda teſticulos veficam anum z femora z ex regionibus belebiget? rura Arabum z fines eius vsqz in allegem:z babet in alcbach participatios nem.Sagittarius ingeniofus a calidus babet ex corpore hominis femora: 7 ex regionibus ethiopiam z mabaraben z achiut vel acenit vel achichit q est india. Capricornus bone vite iracundus cautus 7 calidus:multe trifticie babens ex corpore ſe hominis genua:z ex regiõibus ethiopia annaban al con z acuith z mabamen vſqz ad duo maria etabant z achuit que est india. Aquarius babet ex corpore hominis crura vios ad inferiora cauillarum ida est tallorum z ex regionibus azenes idest nigredinem zalthupha z partes eins z terram elfies 7 partem terre egypti z occidétales plaga z terre achi ut. Pisces calidus z cautus commixtus multi coloris babés ex corpore bo minis pedes: regionibus carabzarem z ſeptétrionalem plagam terreiur gem 7 participationem in romanis vios ad effen babet inſulam z egyptum 7 alexandriam z mare licium. De fignificatione planetarum in fignis km membra bominis. ४ In quidem planete fignificauerint dolorem habent in vno quo 93 figno membrum fibiproprium. Tractemus ergo de dolois bus planetarum in fignis:z primum incipiamus ab Ariete Sa turnus i ariete babet pectus. Jupiter ventrem. Mars caput. Sol femora. Uenus pedes. Mercurius crura. Lun
translation: The terms or bounds of the planets in the signs are those where, in each sign, certain planets have terms arranged through different degrees. From the beginning of Aries up to the sixth degree of the same Aries is the term of Jupiter. From the sixth up to the twelfth is the term of Venus. From the twelfth up to the twentieth is the term of Mercury. From the twentieth to the twenty-fifth is the term of Mars and Saturn. Due to the diversity of their degrees and the difficulty of remembering them, we have described them in a table so that the work may be easier. The Egyptian terms are said to be these: 6 9 8 5 6 5 6 5 7 3 6 1 7 4 6 5 8 7 6 7 6 7 9 6 7 4 7 4 14 6 9 5 7 6 7 6 7 10 7 0 4 7 2 6 8 8 7 7 9 7 2 7 9 4 8 2 0 5 6 1 0 7 7 4 1 2 9 5 8 4 6 5 4 17 7 4 17 8 6 4 4 7 9 16 2 7 5 6 5 12 20 4 3 9 6 2.

Laurus bz arbores a plantant:z ex coupe bois b3 collű z guturis nodú:z exregióis bus ezetimet z almechim z ſandé zaraterad. Bemini eſt ſignú largū boni ai 2 hz ex coupe bois bumeros z brachia z manus:z ex regiõib vigeti z armes nia nutbrabigé etelenimſtet.i.egyptú etbartha.Lancer bz ex arbozub eas q fuerint eğles lögitudie:7 ex coupe bois pectus corftomachi coſtas ſplene 7 pulmoné z ex regiõib armenia minoré z oriétalé plagá buthabe z maſſez 7 acin:z b3 pticipatióezin barach z atrabicen. Leo bzarbores pceras.i.lons gas calidus z verſutus:z multe angustie ats trifticie:7 ex coupe bois ſtoma chú cor dofum latus z ex regiõib artitri usos in finé regionis habitabilis. Uirgo bz qcqd feminat ex feminibor eft larga boni ai:z bzer coupe bois vê trem z interiora.f.telam.i.dyafragma z inteſtina: z ex regionib arguméta z Bum moga agility Libr affem idest quedam regio circa bierusalem z alforas idest eufraten z infula que biſpania z festiruel afeum.Libra habet arbores preras z est larga bos ni animi:z babet ex corpore hominis lumbos zinferiora ventris vmbilicuz 7 pectinem z verenda anchas 7 ilia 7 nates: 7 ex regionibus terram roma nozum vel grecomm z que fuccedunt eis affines vfque ad Africam: babet etiam araffe vel azim vſqz in finem ethiopie z bartban:babet z carmen z fes gestem z thebis uel thebil z tabraſten barab 7 ambarath.Scorpius habet arbores longitudine equales largus boni animi z babet exbominis corpo re verenda teſticulos veficam anum z femora z ex regionibus belebiget? rura Arabum z fines eius vsqz in allegem:z babet in alcbach participatios nem.Sagittarius ingeniofus a calidus babet ex corpore hominis femora: 7 ex regionibus ethiopiam z mabaraben z achiut vel acenit vel achichit q est india. Capricornus bone vite iracundus cautus 7 calidus:multe trifticie babens ex corpore ſe hominis genua:z ex regiõibus ethiopia annaban al con z acuith z mabamen vſqz ad duo maria etabant z achuit que est india. Aquarius babet ex corpore hominis crura vios ad inferiora cauillarum ida est tallorum z ex regionibus azenes idest nigredinem zalthupha z partes eins z terram elfies 7 partem terre egypti z occidétales plaga z terre achi ut. Pisces calidus z cautus commixtus multi coloris babés ex corpore bo minis pedes: regionibus carabzarem z ſeptétrionalem plagam terreiur gem 7 participationem in romanis vios ad effen babet inſulam z egyptum 7 alexandriam z mare licium. De fignificatione planetarum in fignis km membra bominis. ४ In quidem planete fignificauerint dolorem habent in vno quo 93 figno membrum fibiproprium. Tractemus ergo de dolois bus planetarum in fignis:z primum incipiamus ab Ariete Sa turnus i ariete babet pectus. Jupiter ventrem. Mars caput. Sol femora. Uenus pedes. Mercurius crura. Lun
translation: Some prefer triplicities to terms because the lords of triplicities are stronger in nourishment, as they signify nourishment, and because there is no discord in a triplicity, as there is in terms when they are preferred. And some prefer terms to triplicities because the lords of terms are stronger in direction.

author: Alchabitius
title: On the Faces of the Signs and to Which Planets They are Attributed

De faciebus fignoy a cui planetarum attribútur. Acies aut fignop sunt be: vnquoqz ſignuz diuidit in tres partes equales:quelibet pars conflat ex.r.gradibus 7 vocatur facies q rum initium eft a primo gradu arietis. Prima ergo facies est a p mo gradu arietis vsqz in.x.z datur Marti. Secunda uſqz ad.xx. gradu3.2 datur Soli qui fuccedit ei in ordine circulorum. Tertia vios ad fis nem pdicti figni.z eft Generis:fimiliter prima facies Lauri est Mercurii gueneri fuccedit:z ita vſqz in finem fignowz. Lumigitur habueris gra dum in aliquo figno 7 volueris fire ex cuius planetarum facie fit:fume ab initio arietis figna integra vſqz ad fignuz de quo volueris fcire z triplica са 7 quod fupfuerit adde fuper hoc qo preterijt ex faciebus illius figni de quo faciem fcire volueris cum cadem facie cuius dim fcire volueris 7 proijce a planeta qui est vominus faciei figni arietis qui est Mars ſcom fucceffioez circulorum.7.2.7.2 q8 remaferit infra ſeptem numera a Marte p fucceffio nem planetarum': z quo finitus fuerit numerus erit prima facies illius fi gni vnde fuerit gradus vfqsi.io.eiufdé figni illius planete apud quem nu merus erit finitus:za.x.vfcsin.xx.alterius planete qui illum fuccedit:za.xx. vios in finez alterius figni qui ei fucceditiz in cuius decimo fuerit gradus ex figno erit facies illius planete.vocatur r etiam domini facierum iftarum a ge bufdam decani cuius fequitur tabula. I qr iam annuente deo tractauimus de poteftatibus planctax in fignis a fut domus exaltatio triplicitas termivo z facies. Núc igitur tractemus de virtutib ſen fortitudinibus cop in ipfis.nă dins domus 13.5.fortitudines: 7 dominus exal. 4.7 dns tripli. 3.dns termini duasiz dñs faciei vná. Intellige ergo ex 15 nume, anj ro fortitudines planetax.q.n.magis abundant in numero magis abúdant in fortitudine:7 qdam pponit terminu triplicitati.i.volút vt dis termini fit fotiordno triplicitatis:fed iam erpofuimus fupius in quo valet vnusgras. Quidam ét de hac re tale dederit cóparationem dicétes qo planeta cu fue rit in domo sua est fimilis viro in domo atqz in dominate fua:z cum fuerit in exaltatióe ſua eſt ſimilis viro i regnoſuo z gloria:7 cum fuerit in termino ſuo eft sicut vir inter parétes 7 cognatos fuos atos gétes:z cum fuerit in tri plicitate fua erit ficut vir in honore fuo:z iter auxiliatores atos mistros fuos z cú fuerit in facie ſua erit sicut vir in magiſterio fuo. De fút vniuerse poteſta tes planetarum:effentiales in fignis z ſequütur bas figure fignorum. De effentys fignorum z gd fignificent in femetipfis. Uia in fignis funt adam figna q dicunt rénalia.f. Uirgo Bemis ni Libra z Aquarir pma medietas Sagittary qr eox imagines in circulo ad imagines hoium figurantbec quos dicunt figna pulcbras voces babétia bec quos vigent cu fuerint in ouete. Et daz dicunt alas babētia.f.Semini Uirgo z pifces. Et adá ądrupedia:vt Leor Sagittarius. Queda cop funt domestica:vt Aries Tau rus Lapricomus:7 bec vigét cú fuerint in meridie. Uirgo aût z Lapricon? 7 Aquarius vigét cú fuerint in Septētriones. Et ex fignis ādam für totuo fa z vitiofa.l.Aries Taurus Lancer Scorpio z Lapricornus. Et qdaz ex eis dicunt plures proles bitia.f.Cancer Scorpio z Pifces. Et bec vigét cú fue rint in occidere. Et qdam ex eis funt sterilia:vt Bemini Leo Uirgo. Et qdá funt paucos filios bitia:vt Aries Taurus Libra Sagittarius Capricomus z Aquarius. Et dam dicūtur multú luxuriofa.f.Aries Taurus Leor Lap comus. Et ex fignis adam dicunt media voce bitia a formant ad imagies aialium balatium z mugiétium z rugiétium:ut Aries Taurus Leor Lapi conus:z vltima pars ſagittarij. Et qdas funt voce carétia.filla q formant ad imagines aialium voce carentium.f.Cancer Scorpius z pifces. De fignificationibus fignorum. translation: The faces of the signs are these: each sign is divided into three equal parts. Each part consists of ten degrees and is called a face, the beginning of which is from the first degree of Aries. Therefore, the first face is from the first degree of Aries up to the tenth, and it is given to Mars. The second up to the twentieth degree is given to the Sun, who succeeds him in the order of the circles. The third up to the end of the aforesaid sign is of Jupiter. Similarly, the first face of Taurus is of Mercury, who succeeds Venus, and so on to the end of the signs. Therefore, when you have a degree in any sign and wish to know to which planet's face it belongs, take the whole signs from the beginning of Aries up to the sign you wish to know about, and triple it. And what remains, add to what has passed from the faces of that sign about which you wish to know the face, with the same face whose lord you wish to know. And project from the planet who is the lord of the face of the sign of Aries, who is Mars, according to the succession of the circles. And what remains within seven, count from Mars according to the succession of the planets. And where the number ends, that will be the first face of that sign, from which the degree was, up to the tenth of that sign, of the planet at whom the number ends. And from the tenth up to the twentieth, of the other planet who succeeds him. And from the twentieth up to the end, of the other sign who succeeds him. And in whose tenth the degree is from the sign, that will be the face of that planet. The lords of these faces are also called decans by some, whose table follows: In Aries 10 Mars, 10 Sun, 10 Jupiter. In Taurus 10 Venus, 10 Mercury, 10 Saturn. In Gemini 10 Jupiter, 10 Mars, 10 Sun. In Cancer 10 Venus, 10 Mercury, 10 Saturn. In Leo 10 Jupiter, 10 Mars, 10 Sun. In Virgo 10 Venus, 10 Mercury, 10 Saturn. In Libra 10 Jupiter, 10 Mars, 10 Sun. In Scorpio 10 Venus, 10 Mercury, 10 Saturn. In Sagittarius 10 Jupiter, 10 Mars, 10 Sun. In Capricorn 10 Venus, 10 Mercury, 10 Saturn. In Aquarius 10 Jupiter, 10 Mars, 10 Sun. In Pisces 10 Venus, 10 Mercury, 10 Saturn.

translation: Since, by God's grace, we have now discussed the powers of the planets in the signs, which are their house, exaltation, triplicity, term, and face, let us now discuss their virtues or strengths within themselves. For the lord of the house has 5 strengths, the lord of the exaltation 4, the lord of the triplicity 3, the lord of the term 2, and the lord of the face 1. Understand, therefore, from these numbers the strengths of the planets. For those that abound more in number, abound more in strength. And some prefer the term to the triplicity, that is, they want the lord of the term to be stronger than the lord of the triplicity. But we have already explained above in what respect one is valid. Some also have given such a comparison concerning this matter, saying that when a planet is in its house, it is like a man in his own house and in his own dominion. And when it is in its exaltation, it is like a man in his kingdom and glory. And when it is in its term, it is like a man among his parents and relatives and people. And when it is in its triplicity, it will be like a man in his honor and among his helpers and ministers. And when it is in its face, it will be like a man in his magistracy. These are all the essential powers of the planets in the signs, and the figures of the signs follow these.

author: Alchabitius
title: On the Essences of the Signs and What They Signify in Themselves
text: Figura afpectuum.omocninde * H * 100% 스 818 TR 2 如 このまま r S * -A-- * Determinis planetarum. X Unt quos plaetay in fignis termini vel fines:q2 in vnoquos figno bit quos planete termios p diuerfos grad difpofitos:ma ab initio arietis vios ad ſextű gradú eiufdé arietis est terminus Jouis: 7 ases xto vfqz ad.xii.terminus veneris: 79.xii. vſcß ad.xx. terminus Mercurij.z a.20.in. xxv.terminus martis Saturni: zpp diuerfitaté eop graduű:z gra uitaté cop memorie defcripfim eos in tabula vt leuius eet opus. Uidam autem pponunt triplicitates terminis eo q domini tri plicitatum funt fortiores in nutritione:q2fignificat nutritioné: z qe nulla difcordia eft in triplicitate:ficut est in terminis cum p ponunt:z gdam preponunt terminos triplicitatibus:eo q domini terminorum funt fortiores in directione. De faciebus fignoy a cui planetarum attribútur. Acies aut fignop sunt be: vnquoqz ſignuz diuidit in tres partes equales:quelibet pars conflat ex.r.gradibus 7 vocatur facies q rum initium eft a primo gradu arietis. Prima ergo facies est a p mo gradu arietis vsqz in.x.z datur Marti. Secunda uſqz ad.xx. gradu3.2 datur Soli qui fuccedit ei in ordine circulorum. Tertia vios ad fis nem pdicti figni.z eft Generis:fimiliter prima facies Lauri est Mercurii gueneri fuccedit:z ita vſqz in finem fignowz. Lumigitur habueris gra dum in aliquo figno 7 volueris fire ex cuius planetarum facie fit:fume ab initio arietis figna integra vſqz ad fignuz de quo volueris fcire z triplica са 7 quod fupfuerit adde fuper hoc qo preterijt ex faciebus illius figni de quo faciem fcire volueris cum cadem facie cuius dim fcire volueris 7 proijce a planeta qui est vominus faciei figni arietis qui est Mars ſcom fucceffioez circulorum.7.2.7.2 q8 remaferit infra ſeptem numera a Marte p fucceffio nem planetarum': z quo finitus fuerit numerus erit prima facies illius fi gni vnde fuerit gradus vfqsi.io.eiufdé figni illius planete apud quem nu merus erit finitus:za.x.vfcsin.xx.alterius planete qui illum fuccedit:za.xx. vios in finez alterius figni qui ei fucceditiz in cuius decimo fuerit gradus ex figno erit facies illius planete.vocatur r etiam domini facierum iftarum a ge bufdam decani cuius fequitur tabula. In ४io In V 10 to 오io Dio bio Jnㅍ 4 10 ام io to 이오 10 io D to In & bio to In my to 오io to In 10 b 10 174 10 In M10 to 오io 10 Dio bio In o 124 to io lo in2ioio Dio In Xbio | 24 | io | |8| 10 | De virtutibus planetarum. I qr iam annuente deo tractauimus de poteftatibus planctax in fignis a fut domus exaltatio triplicitas termivo z facies. Núc igitur tractemus de virtutib ſen fortitudinibus cop in ipfis.nă dins domus 13.5.fortitudines: 7 dominus exal. 4.7 dns tripli. 3.dns termini duasiz dñs faciei vná. Intellige ergo ex 15 nume, anj ro fortitudines planetax.q.n.magis abundant in numero magis abúdant in fortitudine:7 qdam pponit terminu triplicitati.i.volút vt dis termini fit fotiordno triplicitatis:fed iam erpofuimus fupius in quo valet vnusgras. Quidam ét de hac re tale dederit cóparationem dicétes qo planeta cu fue rit in domo sua est fimilis viro in domo atqz in dominate fua:z cum fuerit in exaltatióe ſua eſt ſimilis viro i regnoſuo z gloria:7 cum fuerit in termino ſuo eft sicut vir inter parétes 7 cognatos fuos atos gétes:z cum fuerit in tri plicitate fua erit ficut vir in honore fuo:z iter auxiliatores atos mistros fuos z cú fuerit in facie ſua erit sicut vir in magiſterio fuo. De fút vniuerse poteſta tes planetarum:effentiales in fignis z ſequütur bas figure fignorum. De effentys fignorum z gd fignificent in femetipfis. Uia in fignis funt adam figna q dicunt rénalia.f. Uirgo Bemis ni Libra z Aquarir pma medietas Sagittary qr eox imagines in circulo ad imagines hoium figurantbec quos dicunt figna pulcbras voces babétia bec quos vigent cu fuerint in ouete. Et daz dicunt alas babētia.f.Semini Uirgo z pifces. Et adá ądrupedia:vt Leor Sagittarius. Queda cop funt domestica:vt Aries Tau rus Lapricomus:7 bec vigét cú fuerint in meridie. Uirgo aût z Lapricon? 7 Aquarius vigét cú fuerint in Septētriones. Et ex fignis ādam für totuo fa z vitiofa.l.Aries Taurus Lancer Scorpio z Lapricornus. Et qdaz ex eis dicunt plures proles bitia.f.Cancer Scorpio z Pifces. Et bec vigét cú fue rint in occidere. Et qdam ex eis funt sterilia:vt Bemini Leo Uirgo. Et qdá funt paucos filios bitia:vt Aries Taurus Libra Sagittarius Capricomus z Aquarius. Et dam dicūtur multú luxuriofa.f.Aries Taurus Leor Lap comus. Et ex fignis adam dicunt media voce bitia a formant ad imagies aialium balatium z mugiétium z rugiétium:ut Aries Taurus Leor Lapi conus:z vltima pars ſagittarij. Et qdas funt voce carétia.filla q formant ad imagines aialium voce carentium.f.Cancer Scorpius z pifces. De fignificationibus fignorum. Z vnúquodqs ſignibz ppia fignificatoes in bis & fignificant ex creative membrop z mozib boium z regionú z ſeminů z arború 7 cetera. Aries bz ex coupe bois caput z facie z ex regiõib bebil:z feriz.i.babilonta z pridem z arabiá z falaſtim z palestina. Laurus bz arbores a plantant:z ex coupe bois b3 collű z guturis nodú:z exregióis bus ezetimet z almechim z ſandé zaraterad. Bemini eſt ſignú largū boni ai 2 hz ex coupe bois bumeros z brachia z manus:z ex regiõib vigeti z armes nia nutbrabigé etelenimſtet.i.egyptú etbartha.Lancer bz ex arbozub eas q fuerint eğles lögitudie:7 ex coupe bois pectus corftomachi coſtas ſplene 7 pulmoné z ex regiõib armenia minoré z oriétalé plagá buthabe z maſſez 7 acin:z b3 pticipatióezin barach z atrabicen. Leo bzarbores pceras.i.lons gas calidus z verſutus:z multe angustie ats trifticie:7 ex coupe bois ſtoma chú cor dofum latus z ex regiõib artitri usos in finé regionis habitabilis. Uirgo bz qcqd feminat ex feminibor eft larga boni ai:z bzer coupe bois vê trem z interiora.f.telam.i.dyafragma z inteſtina: z ex regionib arguméta z Bum moga agility Libr affem idest quedam regio circa bierusalem z alforas idest eufraten z infula que biſpania z festiruel afeum.Libra habet arbores preras z est larga bos ni animi:z babet ex corpore hominis lumbos zinferiora ventris vmbilicuz 7 pectinem z verenda anchas 7 ilia 7 nates: 7 ex regionibus terram roma nozum vel grecomm z que fuccedunt eis affines vfque ad Africam: babet etiam araffe vel azim vſqz in finem ethiopie z bartban:babet z carmen z fes gestem z thebis uel thebil z tabraſten barab 7 ambarath.Scorpius habet arbores longitudine equales largus boni animi z babet exbominis corpo re verenda teſticulos veficam anum z femora z ex regionibus belebiget? rura Arabum z fines eius vsqz in allegem:z babet in alcbach participatios nem.Sagittarius ingeniofus a calidus babet ex corpore hominis femora: 7 ex regionibus ethiopiam z mabaraben z achiut vel acenit vel achichit q est india. Capricornus bone vite iracundus cautus 7 calidus:multe trifticie babens ex corpore ſe hominis genua:z ex regiõibus ethiopia annaban al con z acuith z mabamen vſqz ad duo maria etabant z achuit que est india. Aquarius babet ex corpore hominis crura vios ad inferiora cauillarum ida est tallorum z ex regionibus azenes idest nigredinem zalthupha z partes eins z terram elfies 7 partem terre egypti z occidétales plaga z terre achi ut. Pisces calidus z cautus commixtus multi coloris babés ex corpore bo minis pedes: regionibus carabzarem z ſeptétrionalem plagam terreiur gem 7 participationem in romanis vios ad effen babet inſulam z egyptum 7 alexandriam z mare licium. De fignificatione planetarum in fignis km membra bominis. ४ In quidem planete fignificauerint dolorem habent in vno quo 93 figno membrum fibiproprium. Tractemus ergo de dolois bus planetarum in fignis:z primum incipiamus ab Ariete Sa turnus i ariete babet pectus. Jupiter ventrem. Mars caput. Sol femora. Uenus pedes. Mercurius crura. Lun
translation: Among the signs, there are some signs that are called human, namely Virgo, Gemini, Libra, and Aquarius, and the first half of Sagittarius, because their images in the circle are figured as images of humans. These are also called signs having beautiful voices. These are also strong when they are in the East. And some are said to have wings, namely Gemini, Virgo, and Pisces. And some are quadrupedal, like Leo and Sagittarius. Some of them are domestic, like Aries, Taurus, and Capricorn, and these are strong when they are in the South. But Virgo, Capricorn, and Aquarius are strong when they are in the North. And among the signs, some are entirely fruitful and some are vicious, namely Aries, Taurus, Cancer, Scorpio, and Capricorn. And some of them are said to have many offspring, namely Cancer, Scorpio, and Pisces. And these are strong when they are in the West. And some of them are sterile, like Gemini, Leo, and Virgo. And some have few children, like Aries, Taurus, Libra, Sagittarius, Capricorn, and Aquarius. And some are said to be very luxurious, namely Aries, Taurus, Leo, and Capricorn. And among the signs, some are said to have a medium voice and are formed in the images of bleating, lowing, and roaring animals, like Aries, Taurus, Leo, and Capricorn, and the last part of Sagittarius. And some are voiceless, namely those that are formed in the images of voiceless animals, namely Cancer, Scorpio, and Pisces.

translation: Each sign has its own significations in what it signifies concerning the created members and customs of men, and regions, and seeds, and trees, and so on. Aries has from the body of man the head and face, and from regions, Babylon, and Syria, that is, Babylonia and Persia and Arabia and Philistia and Palestine. Taurus has trees that are planted, and from the body of man it has the neck and the knot of the throat, and from regions, Egypt and Almechim and Sande and Araterad. Gemini is a sign of a generous good spirit and has from the body of man the shoulders and arms and hands, and from regions, Vigeti and Armenia, Nutbrabige and Telenimstet, that is, Egypt and Bartha. Cancer has from trees those that are equal in length, and from the body of man the chest, heart, stomach, ribs, spleen, and lung, and from regions, Lesser Armenia and the eastern region of Buthabe and Masse and Acin, and it has participation in Barach and Atrabicen. Leo has tall trees, that is, long, hot, and cunning, and much distress and sadness, and from the body of man the stomach, heart, back, side, and from regions, Artitri up to the end of the habitable region. Virgo has whatever is sown from seeds, and is generous of good spirit, and has from the body of man the belly and internal parts, that is, the diaphragm and intestines, and from regions, arguments and Bum Moga Agility, Libra, that is, a certain region around Jerusalem and Alforas, that is, the Euphrates, and the island which is Hispania and Festiruel Aseum. Libra has tall trees and is generous of good spirit, and has from the body of man the loins and lower belly, navel, and groin, and genitals, hips, and buttocks, and from regions, the land of the Romans or Greeks and those adjacent to them up to Africa; it also has Arasse or Azim up to the end of Ethiopia and Barthan; it also has Carmen and Sesgestem and Thebes or Thebil and Tabrasten, Barab, and Ambarath. Scorpio has trees of equal length, generous of good spirit, and has from the body of man the genitals, testicles, bladder, anus, and thighs, and from regions, Belebiget and the lands of the Arabs and its borders up to Allegem; and it has participation in Alcbach. Sagittarius is ingenious and hot, has from the body of man the thighs, and from regions, Ethiopia and Maharabem and Achiut or Acenit or Achichit, which is India. Capricorn is of good life, irascible, cautious, and hot, having much sadness, has from the body of man the knees, and from regions, Ethiopia, Annaban, Alcon, and Acuith and Mahabem up to the two seas and Abant and Achuit, which is India. Aquarius has from the body of man the legs up to the lower ankles, that is, the heels, and from regions, Azenes, that is, blackness, and Althupha and its parts, and the land of Elfies and part of the land of Egypt and the western region and the land of Achiut. Pisces is hot and cautious, mixed with many colors, having from the body of man the feet; and from regions, Carabzarem and the northern region of the land of Jurjem and participation in the Romans up to Essen, it has an island and Egypt and Alexandria and the Lycian Sea.

author: Alchabitius
title: On the Signification of Planets in Signs by Members of the Body
