Uidam autem pponunt triplicitates terminis eo q domini tri plicitatum funt fortiores in nutritione:q2fignificat nutritioné: z qe nulla difcordia eft in triplicitate:ficut est in terminis cum p ponunt:z gdam preponunt terminos triplicitatibus:eo q domini terminorum funt fortiores in directione. De faciebus fignoy a cui planetarum attribútur. Acies aut fignop sunt be: vnquoqz ſignuz diuidit in tres partes equales:quelibet pars conflat ex.r.gradibus 7 vocatur facies q rum initium eft a primo gradu arietis. Prima ergo facies est a p mo gradu arietis vsqz in.x.z datur Marti. Secunda uſqz ad.xx. gradu3.2 datur Soli qui fuccedit ei in ordine circulorum. Tertia vios ad fis nem pdicti figni.z eft Generis:fimiliter prima facies Lauri est Mercurii gueneri fuccedit:z ita vſqz in finem fignowz. Lumigitur habueris gra dum in aliquo figno 7 volueris fire ex cuius planetarum facie fit:fume ab initio arietis figna integra vſqz ad fignuz de quo volueris fcire z triplica са 7 quod fupfuerit adde fuper hoc qo preterijt ex faciebus illius figni de quo faciem fcire volueris cum cadem facie cuius dim fcire volueris 7 proijce a planeta qui est vominus faciei figni arietis qui est Mars ſcom fucceffioez circulorum.7.2.7.2 q8 remaferit infra ſeptem numera a Marte p fucceffio nem planetarum': z quo finitus fuerit numerus erit prima facies illius fi gni vnde fuerit gradus vfqsi.io.eiufdé figni illius planete apud quem nu merus erit finitus:za.x.vfcsin.xx.alterius planete qui illum fuccedit:za.xx. vios in finez alterius figni qui ei fucceditiz in cuius decimo fuerit gradus ex figno erit facies illius planete.vocatur r etiam domini facierum iftarum a ge bufdam decani cuius fequitur tabula. I qr iam annuente deo tractauimus de poteftatibus planctax in fignis a fut domus exaltatio triplicitas termivo z facies. Núc igitur tractemus de virtutib ſen fortitudinibus cop in ipfis.nă dins domus 13.5.fortitudines: 7 dominus exal. 4.7 dns tripli. 3.dns termini duasiz dñs faciei vná. Intellige ergo ex 15 nume, anj ro fortitudines planetax.q.n.magis abundant in numero magis abúdant in fortitudine:7 qdam pponit terminu triplicitati.i.volút vt dis termini fit fotiordno triplicitatis:fed iam erpofuimus fupius in quo valet vnusgras. Quidam ét de hac re tale dederit cóparationem dicétes qo planeta cu fue rit in domo sua est fimilis viro in domo atqz in dominate fua:z cum fuerit in exaltatióe ſua eſt ſimilis viro i regnoſuo z gloria:7 cum fuerit in termino ſuo eft sicut vir inter parétes 7 cognatos fuos atos gétes:z cum fuerit in tri plicitate fua erit ficut vir in honore fuo:z iter auxiliatores atos mistros fuos z cú fuerit in facie ſua erit sicut vir in magiſterio fuo. De fút vniuerse poteſta tes planetarum:effentiales in fignis z ſequütur bas figure fignorum. De effentys fignorum z gd fignificent in femetipfis. Uia in fignis funt adam figna q dicunt rénalia.f. Uirgo Bemis ni Libra z Aquarir pma medietas Sagittary qr eox imagines in circulo ad imagines hoium figurantbec quos dicunt figna pulcbras voces babétia bec quos vigent cu fuerint in ouete. Et daz dicunt alas babētia.f.Semini Uirgo z pifces. Et adá ądrupedia:vt Leor Sagittarius. Queda cop funt domestica:vt Aries Tau rus Lapricomus:7 bec vigét cú fuerint in meridie. Uirgo aût z Lapricon? 7 Aquarius vigét cú fuerint in Septētriones. Et ex fignis ādam für totuo fa z vitiofa.l.Aries Taurus Lancer Scorpio z Lapricornus. Et qdaz ex eis dicunt plures proles bitia.f.Cancer Scorpio z Pifces. Et bec vigét cú fue rint in occidere. Et qdam ex eis funt sterilia:vt Bemini Leo Uirgo. Et qdá funt paucos filios bitia:vt Aries Taurus Libra Sagittarius Capricomus z Aquarius. Et dam dicūtur multú luxuriofa.f.Aries Taurus Leor Lap comus. Et ex fignis adam dicunt media voce bitia a formant ad imagies aialium balatium z mugiétium z rugiétium:ut Aries Taurus Leor Lapi conus:z vltima pars ſagittarij. Et qdas funt voce carétia.filla q formant ad imagines aialium voce carentium.f.Cancer Scorpius z pifces. De fignificationibus fignorum. Z vnúquodqs ſignibz ppia fignificatoes in bis & fignificant ex creative membrop z mozib boium z regionú z ſeminů z arború 7 cetera. Aries bz ex coupe bois caput z facie z ex regiõib bebil:z feriz.i.babilonta z pridem z arabiá z falaſtim z palestina. Laurus bz arbores a plantant:z ex coupe bois b3 collű z guturis nodú:z exregióis bus ezetimet z almechim z ſandé zaraterad. Bemini eſt ſignú largū boni ai 2 hz ex coupe bois bumeros z brachia z manus:z ex regiõib vigeti z armes nia nutbrabigé etelenimſtet.i.egyptú etbartha.Lancer bz ex arbozub eas q fuerint eğles lögitudie:7 ex coupe bois pectus corftomachi coſtas ſplene 7 pulmoné z ex regiõib armenia minoré z oriétalé plagá buthabe z maſſez 7 acin:z b3 pticipatióezin barach z atrabicen. Leo bzarbores pceras.i.lons gas calidus z verſutus:z multe angustie ats trifticie:7 ex coupe bois ſtoma chú cor dofum latus z ex regiõib artitri usos in finé regionis habitabilis. Uirgo bz qcqd feminat ex feminibor eft larga boni ai:z bzer coupe bois vê trem z interiora.f.telam.i.dyafragma z inteſtina: z ex regionib arguméta z Bum moga agility Libr affem idest quedam regio circa bierusalem z alforas idest eufraten z infula que biſpania z festiruel afeum.Libra habet arbores preras z est larga bos ni animi:z babet ex corpore hominis lumbos zinferiora ventris vmbilicuz 7 pectinem z verenda anchas 7 ilia 7 nates: 7 ex regionibus terram roma nozum vel grecomm z que fuccedunt eis affines vfque ad Africam: babet etiam araffe vel azim vſqz in finem ethiopie z bartban:babet z carmen z fes gestem z thebis uel thebil z tabraſten barab 7 ambarath.Scorpius habet arbores longitudine equales largus boni animi z babet exbominis corpo re verenda teſticulos veficam anum z femora z ex regionibus belebiget? rura Arabum z fines eius vsqz in allegem:z babet in alcbach participatios nem.Sagittarius ingeniofus a calidus babet ex corpore hominis femora: 7 ex regionibus ethiopiam z mabaraben z achiut vel acenit vel achichit q est india. Capricornus bone vite iracundus cautus 7 calidus:multe trifticie babens ex corpore ſe hominis genua:z ex regiõibus ethiopia annaban al con z acuith z mabamen vſqz ad duo maria etabant z achuit que est india. Aquarius babet ex corpore hominis crura vios ad inferiora cauillarum ida est tallorum z ex regionibus azenes idest nigredinem zalthupha z partes eins z terram elfies 7 partem terre egypti z occidétales plaga z terre achi ut. Pisces calidus z cautus commixtus multi coloris babés ex corpore bo minis pedes: regionibus carabzarem z ſeptétrionalem plagam terreiur gem 7 participationem in romanis vios ad effen babet inſulam z egyptum 7 alexandriam z mare licium. De fignificatione planetarum in fignis km membra bominis. ४ In quidem planete fignificauerint dolorem habent in vno quo 93 figno membrum fibiproprium. Tractemus ergo de dolois bus planetarum in fignis:z primum incipiamus ab Ariete Sa turnus i ariete babet pectus. Jupiter ventrem. Mars caput. Sol femora. Uenus pedes. Mercurius crura. Lun
translation: Indeed, when planets signify pain, they have a proper member in each sign. Let us therefore discuss the pains of the planets in the signs: and first let us begin with Aries. Saturn in Aries has the chest. Jupiter the belly. Mars the head. The Sun the thighs. Venus the feet. Mercury the legs. The Moon...

MOQ QUINS suapanS H Ω diem:z vnaques ps iftarum partium diuidif in tres partes inequales Fm afcenfiones figni afcendentes ats hoc mo diuiditur circulus in duodecim partes que vocatur domus nominantur quoqz z cufpides z turres:cuius opus expofitum est in libro Ezibi ideft in lib20 curſus ſiderum. Principium quoqs diuifionis est horoscopus:hoc eft afcendens cuius initium eft fuper circulum bemiſperij orientalis deinde fecunda domus fequitur z tertia:ces terez domus visad duodecimam. Quarta autem pars que est ab afcena dente vſqs ad medium celi:que é domus duodecima vndecima z decima di citur quarta pars oriétalis mafculina:z adueniens fignificat initiű vite:z vo catur puerilis fanguinea vernalis.Et ps alia que é a medio celi ylos ad gras Aum occidentalis figni ideft feptime qui eſt ſuper circulum bemifperij occi dentalis que é domus nona octaua:z ſeptima:z eſt merediana feminina re cedens fignificat mediam etates:7 vocatur profecto iuuentutis eftiualis co lerica. Tertia quos ps que est ab occidente viqs ad gradum quarte dos mus que eft fup circulű meridiei fub terra que est domus ſexta quinta z ärs ta.est occidentalis masculina adueniens significat finez vite:z vocatur autú nalis melácolica z eſt ſenilis z est mediocris etatis. Quarts ps que fút a quarta domo vis ad ascendens que domus est tertia fecunda atqz afcen dens eft feptentrionalis feminina recedens fignificat quod accidit bomini poſt mortem eius z ad quid deveniet corpus eius vel eius diſpoſitio de dia miſſa ſubſtantia:aut quid dicetur de eo ſcilicet vtrum laudetur vel vitupere tur: vocat bec pars ſenilis flegmatica defectius byemalis. Et ille due par tes que fút a medio celi vſqz ad afcendens:z ab afcendente vios ad quartam Domuni:ifta medietas vocatur medietas afcendens:7 relique partes q fút a quarta domo vis ad ſeptimam:z inde ad medium celi vocatur medietas defcendés. Et quicquid fuerit ſuper terram ex circulo ideftilla pars circuli Superior dicitur dextra:z que ſubterra idest illa pars inferior dicitur finiftra. Et afcendens z quarta z ſeptima z decima dicitur alamed id est quas nos angulos vocamus vt pulchrius ſonet. Et fecunda domus octaua a quinta z vndecima fuccedentes angulis vocantur. Tertia aut 7.vi.viij.ac.rij.cadentes ab angulis dicuntur. Cum ergo planeta in angulis vel eius ſuccedé tibus fuerit dicitur pficeretz fi fuerit in cadentibus ab angulis dicit defices rez vnaques iftarum domorum fignificat aliquid de eſſe bominum. De domibus z fignificationibus earum. Rima domus cuius initiű orif in circulo bemiſperij orientalis vocat athale.i.afcédés:bec fignificat corpa z vită z initia open i iterrogatioibusz ozone et locutiõe et rumoubet gegd cogitat iterrogás iaio ſuoret fignificat initia vite. Et dixit alendezgod in natiuitatcig dris triplicitatis aſcédétis pri ſigt vită et natura nati feu iterro gatis et ei delectationé atqz volútatézet ad diligat:et gd odio beat:z gd bói Teu mali ei adueniat in initio vite eius:et dominus triplicitatis fecüdus figt vitá et corpus et virtuté feu fortitudiné et medietaté vite:et ons triplicitatis tertius fignificat id qo ſocij ei fignificauerút:et fignificat fine vite in morte. Ecunda domus é dom ſubſtatie ac victus et miniſtrox et auris liatorú et fignificat finé ánorú vite ideft finé iuuentutis.Et dixit alédezgod de dñis triplicitatis dom beide prio.f.fcdo ac de ter tio vide gs eorú fit fotioree et loco būc facies merito auctorem Be et ſignificatore acqfitióis:q si fuerit i medio celi iueniet baca rege:et si fuerit i domo fidei alias fiducie é meli. Silr dis triplicitatio.pm? dat fubam in initio vitezet ſcos in medio vitezet tertius i fine ei?. Ertia domé fratrű et ſozori et ppinquorú ac dilectop fidei atqz religióis mandatori ac legatori mutationu atqz itinerű minos rum:et fignificat effe vite ante moné. dixit alendezgod dominus triplicitatie dom fratrů.primus fignat fratres maiorceret fcde medios.tertius minores;eritos eorú dignitas et eorú eſſe ſecundú locs cop Uarta domus i patų hereditatū finis reri? thefauroy z oiuz abſcóditop atqz occultor: fignat de ee vite hominú finez.dixit alendezgod qvoming triplicitatis domus patrí.primus figni ficat patres.fcos ciuitates z terras.tertius fines rep z carceres. Uinta domus filio2137 dilectioni legatop atqs donationum:? fignificat qö futurű fit poſt morté ex laude.f.z vituperio.dixit alé dezgod y dominus triplicitatis domus filiox.prim fignificat filios z vitam.fecúdus dilectioné.tertius vero legatos. Exta domus est infirmitatúr feruorum: significat finé vitez ge quid futurum fit ate senectute.dixit alendezgod dominus tripli citatis domus ifirmitatu.primus fignificat infirmitates 7 valitu dines ab ifirmitatibus 7 a malis a deteriorationes.fcos fignifie cat vnaculos z feruos.tertius fignificat ad eueniet ex eis z cop vtilitate atqz oparz ſignificator est bestiar ac pecori:z omniú quadrupedů: fortitudinis cop multitudinis quoqz eop ac paucitatis more cop in manu ei vel egreffióis cop ab ea.f.mau:carceris quoq3 atqz retétőiss Eptima dom? é mulier nuptiap:cótétioni quoqz atq3 pticipa tionú z oppoſitozuiz ſigt medietaté finis vite erga ſenectutez.Di xit alédezgod y domin triplicitatis domus.vij.pmus figt mu lieres.fcos côtétiões.tertius cómixtiones 2 pticipatiões. Ltaua domus émotis:figť timoré z mortezatqz almauerith.i. ſubſtantias vel hereditates mortuor quas debet beredes post morte ipſori poffidere z fignificat anoų vite fi
translation: In the signs there are certain degrees which are called pits: when a planet is in any of them, it is said to be in a pit, such as the sixth degree of Aries, etc., as will be shown in the following table. Aries: 6, 11, 16, 23, 29. Taurus: 8, 15, 21, 24, 25. Gemini: 2, 12, 17, 26. Cancer: 20, 30. Leo: 22, 23, 28. Virgo: 6, 12, 17, 23, 26. Libra: 8, 13, 15. Scorpio: 8, 13, 15, 21, 25. Sagittarius: 17, 20, 30. Capricorn: 9, 10, 22, 23, 27. Aquarius: 1, 17, 21, 25. Pisces: 12, 24, 27, 30.

Quarta autem pars que est ab afcena dente vſqs ad medium celi:que é domus duodecima vndecima z decima di citur quarta pars oriétalis mafculina:z adueniens fignificat initiű vite:z vo catur puerilis fanguinea vernalis.Et ps alia que é a medio celi ylos ad gras Aum occidentalis figni ideft feptime qui eſt ſuper circulum bemifperij occi dentalis que é domus nona octaua:z ſeptima:z eſt merediana feminina re cedens fignificat mediam etates:7 vocatur profecto iuuentutis eftiualis co lerica. Tertia quos ps que est ab occidente viqs ad gradum quarte dos mus que eft fup circulű meridiei fub terra que est domus ſexta quinta z ärs ta.est occidentalis masculina adueniens significat finez vite:z vocatur autú nalis melácolica z eſt ſenilis z est mediocris etatis. Quarts ps que fút a quarta domo vis ad ascendens que domus est tertia fecunda atqz afcen dens eft feptentrionalis feminina recedens fignificat quod accidit bomini poſt mortem eius z ad quid deveniet corpus eius vel eius diſpoſitio de dia miſſa ſubſtantia:aut quid dicetur de eo ſcilicet vtrum laudetur vel vitupere tur: vocat bec pars ſenilis flegmatica defectius byemalis. Et ille due par tes que fút a medio celi vſqz ad afcendens:z ab afcendente vios ad quartam Domuni:ifta medietas vocatur medietas afcendens:7 relique partes q fút a quarta domo vis ad ſeptimam:z inde ad medium celi vocatur medietas defcendés. Et quicquid fuerit ſuper terram ex circulo ideftilla pars circuli Superior dicitur dextra:z que ſubterra idest illa pars inferior dicitur finiftra. Et afcendens z quarta z ſeptima z decima dicitur alamed id est quas nos angulos vocamus vt pulchrius ſonet. Et fecunda domus octaua a quinta z vndecima fuccedentes angulis vocantur. Tertia aut 7.vi.viij.ac.rij.cadentes ab angulis dicuntur. Cum ergo planeta in angulis vel eius ſuccedé tibus fuerit dicitur pficeretz fi fuerit in cadentibus ab angulis dicit defices rez vnaques iftarum domorum fignificat aliquid de eſſe bominum. De domibus z fignificationibus earum. Rima domus cuius initiű orif in circulo bemiſperij orientalis vocat athale.i.afcédés:bec fignificat corpa z vită z initia open i iterrogatioibusz ozone et locutiõe et rumoubet gegd cogitat iterrogás iaio ſuoret fignificat initia vite. Et dixit alendezgod in natiuitatcig dris triplicitatis aſcédétis pri ſigt vită et natura nati feu iterro gatis et ei delectationé atqz volútatézet ad diligat:et gd odio beat:z gd bói Teu mali ei adueniat in initio vite eius:et dominus triplicitatis fecüdus figt vitá et corpus et virtuté feu fortitudiné et medietaté vite:et ons triplicitatis tertius fignificat id qo ſocij ei fignificauerút:et fignificat fine vite in morte. Ecunda domus é dom ſubſtatie ac victus et miniſtrox et auris liatorú et fignificat finé ánorú vite ideft finé iuuentutis.Et dixit alédezgod de dñis triplicitatis dom beide prio.f.fcdo ac de ter tio vide gs eorú fit fotioree et loco būc facies merito auctorem Be et ſignificatore acqfitióis:q si fuerit i medio celi iueniet baca rege:et si fuerit i domo fidei alias fiducie é meli. Silr dis triplicitatio.pm? dat fubam in initio vitezet ſcos in medio vitezet tertius i fine ei?. Ertia domé fratrű et ſozori et ppinquorú ac dilectop fidei atqz religióis mandatori ac legatori mutationu atqz itinerű minos rum:et fignificat effe vite ante moné. dixit alendezgod dominus triplicitatie dom fratrů.primus fignat fratres maiorceret fcde medios.tertius minores;eritos eorú dignitas et eorú eſſe ſecundú locs cop Uarta domus i patų hereditatū finis reri? thefauroy z oiuz abſcóditop atqz occultor: fignat de ee vite hominú finez.dixit alendezgod qvoming triplicitatis domus patrí.primus figni ficat patres.fcos ciuitates z terras.tertius fines rep z carceres. Uinta domus filio2137 dilectioni legatop atqs donationum:? fignificat qö futurű fit poſt morté ex laude.f.z vituperio.dixit alé dezgod y dominus triplicitatis domus filiox.prim fignificat filios z vitam.fecúdus dilectioné.tertius vero legatos. Exta domus est infirmitatúr feruorum: significat finé vitez ge quid futurum fit ate senectute.dixit alendezgod dominus tripli citatis domus ifirmitatu.primus fignificat infirmitates 7 valitu dines ab ifirmitatibus 7 a malis a deteriorationes.fcos fignifie cat vnaculos z feruos.tertius fignificat ad eueniet ex eis z cop vtilitate atqz oparz ſignificator est bestiar ac pecori:z omniú quadrupedů: fortitudinis cop multitudinis quoqz eop ac paucitatis more cop in manu ei vel egreffióis cop ab ea.f.mau:carceris quoq3 atqz retétőiss Eptima dom? é mulier nuptiap:cótétioni quoqz atq3 pticipa tionú z oppoſitozuiz ſigt medietaté finis vite erga ſenectutez.Di xit alédezgod y domin triplicitatis domus.vij.pmus figt mu lieres.fcos côtétiões.tertius cómixtiones 2 pticipatiões. Ltaua domus émotis:figť timoré z mortezatqz almauerith.i. ſubſtantias vel hereditates mortuor quas debet beredes post morte ipſori poffidere z fignificat anoų vite fi
translation: There are in the signs certain degrees which are called Azemena degrees, that is, degrees of bodily debility. For Azemena signifies a temporary bodily debility, such as deafness, blindness, loss of limbs, and other such things which a person will have as long as they live, unless miraculously healed. Therefore, if the Moon is in these degrees at the birth of a child, the aforesaid Azemena will befall him, according to the signification of the place and aspect or places of the planets. Azemena also signifies various things in different ways, as you will find in books of nativities. The Azemena degrees are those described in this table. Aries: 8, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10. Taurus: 1, 19, 29. Gemini: 1, 7, 8, 18, 19. Cancer: 9, 10, 11, 12, 13, 14, 15. Leo: 6, 20, 27, 28, 29. Virgo: 18, 19. Libra: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6. Scorpio: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6. Sagittarius: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6. Capricorn: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6. Aquarius: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6. Pisces: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6.

translation: In this circle there are certain degrees which are said to increase fortune, which are described in this table. Aries: 8, 18, 27, 28. Taurus: 1, 2, 3, 15, 27. Gemini: 5, 13, 15. Cancer: 21. Leo: 7, 18, 20. Virgo: 13, 20. Libra: 19. Scorpio: 1, 2, 3, 4, 15. Sagittarius: 5, 7, 13, 14, 20. Capricorn: 12, 13, 14, 20. Aquarius: 7, 16, 17, 20. Pisces: 13, 20.

Et dixit alendezgod in natiuitatcig dris triplicitatis aſcédétis pri ſigt vită et natura nati feu iterro gatis et ei delectationé atqz volútatézet ad diligat:et gd odio beat:z gd bói Teu mali ei adueniat in initio vite eius:et dominus triplicitatis fecüdus figt vitá et corpus et virtuté feu fortitudiné et medietaté vite:et ons triplicitatis tertius fignificat id qo ſocij ei fignificauerút:et fignificat fine vite in morte. Ecunda domus é dom ſubſtatie ac victus et miniſtrox et auris liatorú et fignificat finé ánorú vite ideft finé iuuentutis.Et dixit alédezgod de dñis triplicitatis dom beide prio.f.fcdo ac de ter tio vide gs eorú fit fotioree et loco būc facies merito auctorem Be et ſignificatore acqfitióis:q si fuerit i medio celi iueniet baca rege:et si fuerit i domo fidei alias fiducie é meli. Silr dis triplicitatio.pm? dat fubam in initio vitezet ſcos in medio vitezet tertius i fine ei?. Ertia domé fratrű et ſozori et ppinquorú ac dilectop fidei atqz religióis mandatori ac legatori mutationu atqz itinerű minos rum:et fignificat effe vite ante moné. dixit alendezgod dominus triplicitatie dom fratrů.primus fignat fratres maiorceret fcde medios.tertius minores;eritos eorú dignitas et eorú eſſe ſecundú locs cop Uarta domus i patų hereditatū finis reri? thefauroy z oiuz abſcóditop atqz occultor: fignat de ee vite hominú finez.dixit alendezgod qvoming triplicitatis domus patrí.primus figni ficat patres.fcos ciuitates z terras.tertius fines rep z carceres. Uinta domus filio2137 dilectioni legatop atqs donationum:? fignificat qö futurű fit poſt morté ex laude.f.z vituperio.dixit alé dezgod y dominus triplicitatis domus filiox.prim fignificat filios z vitam.fecúdus dilectioné.tertius vero legatos. Exta domus est infirmitatúr feruorum: significat finé vitez ge quid futurum fit ate senectute.dixit alendezgod dominus tripli citatis domus ifirmitatu.primus fignificat infirmitates 7 valitu dines ab ifirmitatibus 7 a malis a deteriorationes.fcos fignifie cat vnaculos z feruos.tertius fignificat ad eueniet ex eis z cop vtilitate atqz oparz ſignificator est bestiar ac pecori:z omniú quadrupedů: fortitudinis cop multitudinis quoqz eop ac paucitatis more cop in manu ei vel egreffióis cop ab ea.f.mau:carceris quoq3 atqz retétőiss Eptima dom? é mulier nuptiap:cótétioni quoqz atq3 pticipa tionú z oppoſitozuiz ſigt medietaté finis vite erga ſenectutez.Di xit alédezgod y domin triplicitatis domus.vij.pmus figt mu lieres.fcos côtétiões.tertius cómixtiones 2 pticipatiões. Ltaua domus émotis:figť timoré z mortezatqz almauerith.i. ſubſtantias vel hereditates mortuor quas debet beredes post morte ipſori poffidere z fignificat anoų vite fi
translation: Two degrees which are of the same longitude from the beginning of the cardinal signs are called compatible, that is, of equal strength and consonant or participating in virtue. For example, the 20th degree of Capricorn or Cancer with the 10th degree of Sagittarius or Gemini; the 20th degree of Aries or Libra with the 10th degree of Pisces or Leo.

title: On the Accidental Circle

MOQ QUINS suapanS H Ω diem:z vnaques ps iftarum partium diuidif in tres partes inequales Fm afcenfiones figni afcendentes ats hoc mo diuiditur circulus in duodecim partes que vocatur domus nominantur quoqz z cufpides z turres:cuius opus expofitum est in libro Ezibi ideft in lib20 curſus ſiderum. Principium quoqs diuifionis est horoscopus:hoc eft afcendens cuius initium eft fuper circulum bemiſperij orientalis deinde fecunda domus fequitur z tertia:ces terez domus visad duodecimam. Quarta autem pars que est ab afcena dente vſqs ad medium celi:que é domus duodecima vndecima z decima di citur quarta pars oriétalis mafculina:z adueniens fignificat initiű vite:z vo catur puerilis fanguinea vernalis.Et ps alia que é a medio celi ylos ad gras Aum occidentalis figni ideft feptime qui eſt ſuper circulum bemifperij occi dentalis que é domus nona octaua:z ſeptima:z eſt merediana feminina re cedens fignificat mediam etates:7 vocatur profecto iuuentutis eftiualis co lerica. Tertia quos ps que est ab occidente viqs ad gradum quarte dos mus que eft fup circulű meridiei fub terra que est domus ſexta quinta z ärs ta.est occidentalis masculina adueniens significat finez vite:z vocatur autú nalis melácolica z eſt ſenilis z est mediocris etatis. Quarts ps que fút a quarta domo vis ad ascendens que domus est tertia fecunda atqz afcen dens eft feptentrionalis feminina recedens fignificat quod accidit bomini poſt mortem eius z ad quid deveniet corpus eius vel eius diſpoſitio de dia miſſa ſubſtantia:aut quid dicetur de eo ſcilicet vtrum laudetur vel vitupere tur: vocat bec pars ſenilis flegmatica defectius byemalis. Et ille due par tes que fút a medio celi vſqz ad afcendens:z ab afcendente vios ad quartam Domuni:ifta medietas vocatur medietas afcendens:7 relique partes q fút a quarta domo vis ad ſeptimam:z inde ad medium celi vocatur medietas defcendés. Et quicquid fuerit ſuper terram ex circulo ideftilla pars circuli Superior dicitur dextra:z que ſubterra idest illa pars inferior dicitur finiftra. Et afcendens z quarta z ſeptima z decima dicitur alamed id est quas nos angulos vocamus vt pulchrius ſonet. Et fecunda domus octaua a quinta z vndecima fuccedentes angulis vocantur. Tertia aut 7.vi.viij.ac.rij.cadentes ab angulis dicuntur. Cum ergo planeta in angulis vel eius ſuccedé tibus fuerit dicitur pficeretz fi fuerit in cadentibus ab angulis dicit defices rez vnaques iftarum domorum fignificat aliquid de eſſe bominum. translation: Having, with God's help, brought forth all that pertains to the essential circle of the signs, we now turn to the accidental. For the circle is figured at every hour in such a way that it is divided into four parts, which the circle of the hemisphere and the circle of the meridian (that is, the circle of the midheaven) divide, which makes the mid-day. And each of these parts is divided into three unequal parts according to the ascensions of the ascending signs. And in this way the circle is divided into twelve parts which are called houses, and are also named cusps and towers, the work of which is explained in the book of Ezibi, that is, in the book of the course of the stars. The beginning of the division is also the horoscope, that is, the ascendant, whose beginning is above the circle of the eastern hemisphere. Then the second house follows, and the third, and the rest of the houses up to the twelfth. The fourth part, which is from the ascendant to the midheaven, which is the twelfth, eleventh, and tenth house, is called the eastern masculine fourth part, and arriving, it signifies the beginning of life, and is called childish, sanguine, vernal. And the other part, which is from the midheaven to the degree of the western sign, that is, the seventh, which is above the circle of the western hemisphere, which is the ninth, eighth, and seventh house, and is meridian, feminine, receding, signifies middle age, and is called truly youthful, aestival, choleric. The third part, which is from the west to the degree of the fourth house, which is above the meridian circle under the earth, which is the sixth, fifth, and fourth house, is western, masculine, arriving, signifies the end of life, and is called autumnal, melancholic, and is senile and of middle age. The fourth part, which is from the fourth house to the ascendant, which is the third, second, and ascendant house, is northern, feminine, receding, signifies what happens to a person after his death and to what his body will come, or his disposition concerning the dismissed substance, or what will be said of him, namely whether he will be praised or blamed. This part is called senile, phlegmatic, defective, hibernal. And those two parts which are from the midheaven to the ascendant, and from the ascendant to the fourth house, this half is called the ascending half. And the remaining parts which are from the fourth house to the seventh, and thence to the midheaven, are called the descending half. And whatever is above the earth of the circle, that is, that upper part of the circle, is called the right. And what is under the earth, that is, that lower part, is called the left. And the ascendant, and the fourth, and the seventh, and the tenth are called Alamed, that is, what we call angles, so that it sounds more beautiful. And the second house, the eighth, the fifth, and the eleventh are called succedent to the angles. But the third, sixth, ninth, and twelfth are called cadent from the angles. Therefore, when a planet is in the angles or its succedents, it is said to be effective. And if it is in the cadent houses from the angles, it is said to be defective. And each of these houses signifies something concerning the existence of men.

Uinta domus filio2137 dilectioni legatop atqs donationum:? fignificat qö futurű fit poſt morté ex laude.f.z vituperio.dixit alé dezgod y dominus triplicitatis domus filiox.prim fignificat filios z vitam.fecúdus dilectioné.tertius vero legatos. Exta domus est infirmitatúr feruorum: significat finé vitez ge quid futurum fit ate senectute.dixit alendezgod dominus tripli citatis domus ifirmitatu.primus fignificat infirmitates 7 valitu dines ab ifirmitatibus 7 a malis a deteriorationes.fcos fignifie cat vnaculos z feruos.tertius fignificat ad eueniet ex eis z cop vtilitate atqz oparz ſignificator est bestiar ac pecori:z omniú quadrupedů: fortitudinis cop multitudinis quoqz eop ac paucitatis more cop in manu ei vel egreffióis cop ab ea.f.mau:carceris quoq3 atqz retétőiss Eptima dom? é mulier nuptiap:cótétioni quoqz atq3 pticipa tionú z oppoſitozuiz ſigt medietaté finis vite erga ſenectutez.Di xit alédezgod y domin triplicitatis domus.vij.pmus figt mu lieres.fcos côtétiões.tertius cómixtiones 2 pticipatiões. Ltaua domus émotis:figť timoré z mortezatqz almauerith.i. ſubſtantias vel hereditates mortuor quas debet beredes post morte ipſori poffidere z fignificat anoų vite fi
translation: The first house, whose beginning rises in the circle of the eastern hemisphere, is called Athale, that is, the ascendant. This signifies the body and life and the beginnings of actions in interrogations, and speech and rumor, and whatever the querent thinks in his mind. It signifies the beginnings of life. And Alendezgod said that in nativities, the lord of the first triplicity of the ascendant signifies the life and nature of the native or querent, and his delight and will, and what he loves, and what he hates, and what good or evil will befall him in the beginning of his life. And the second lord of the triplicity signifies life and body and virtue or strength and the middle of life. And the third lord of the triplicity signifies that which his companions have signified for him, and signifies the end of life in death. The second house is the house of substance and sustenance and ministers and helpers, and signifies the end of the years of life, that is, the end of youth. And Alendezgod said concerning the lords of the triplicity of this house, the first, second, and third, see which of them is stronger, and you will rightly make him the author and significator of acquisition, for if he is in the midheaven, he will find a king, and if he is in the house of faith or trust, it is better. Similarly, the first lord of the triplicity gives substance in the beginning of life, and the second in the middle of life, and the third at its end. The third house is of brothers and sisters and relatives and loved ones, of faith and religion, of commands and legates, of changes and minor journeys, and signifies the existence of life before death. Alendezgod said that the lord of the triplicity of the house of brothers, the first signifies older brothers, the second middle ones, the third younger ones, and their dignity and their existence according to their places. The fourth house is of fathers, inheritances, the end of things, treasures, and all hidden and secret things. It signifies the end of human life. Alendezgod said that the lord of the triplicity of the house of fathers, the first signifies fathers, the second cities and lands, the third the ends of things and prisons. The fifth house is of children and loves, of legates and gifts, and signifies what will be after death, namely praise and blame. Alendezgod said that the lord of the triplicity of the house of children, the first signifies children and life, the second love, the third legates. The sixth house is of infirmities and servants, and signifies the end of life and what will happen before old age. Alendezgod said that the lord of the triplicity of the house of infirmities, the first signifies infirmities and recovery from infirmities and from evils and deteriorations. The second signifies eyes and servants. The third signifies what will happen from them and their utility and works. And it is the significator of beasts and cattle, and all quadrupeds, of their strength and their multitude, and also their death in his hand or their departure from it, that is, from the hand, and also of prison and detention. The seventh house is of women, marriages, contentions, and partnerships and oppositions, and signifies the middle of the end of life towards old age. Alendezgod said that the lord of the triplicity of the seventh house, the first signifies women, the second contentions, the third mixtures and partnerships. The eighth house is of death. It signifies fear and death and Almauerith, that is, the substances or inheritances of the dead which the heirs ought to possess after their death, and it signifies the years of life if...

author: Alchabitius
title: Significations of Angular Lords
text: nes per causas medicine atqz astronomieset per opera ſpiritualia atopinge nie et confimiliat et fignificat per preſentiam fuamin.x.fonunaz per couens tiones et negociatiões et per vrozes et per causas regis. Presentia vero do mini örte i quarta ſignificat fortună ex cultu terreret fructu per caufas pa trum atos res antiquasiet per plentiam eius in afcendete fignificat fortuna ex cultu terre et fructu per ingenium et confilij pfunditaté: et preſentia fua in.x.fignificat pfectum ex cultu terre et fructu per causas regis et magiste riorum. Et pritia ſua in ſeptima ſignificat fortunam ex cultu terre et fructus per caufas vroum et fatorum:et per negociationes. Dec fignificant domis ni angulorum per preſentiaz fuam in angulis fuis. Similiter ergo facies de preſentia dominorum ceterarum domorum:et ideo introduximus tm dominos angulorum vt effet exemplar in ceteris. E Qualiter ſciatur quis planeta fit dominator. I cú volueris ſcire planeta dominatorem rei afpicias quis plas netarum fit pluris auctoritatis in domo reiset planetam q fignis ficat naturam illius rei:ficut dicemus in naturis planetaruz. vis de ergo quis planetaruzfit fortior in domoreiteti parte eius ex fortitudinibus quas prediximus ideft ex numero quem prediximus duz de fortitudine planetaruz et poteftate tractauimus et qui fortior omnibus fue rit in loco reisipfe erit dominator eius: verbi gratia:fi interrogatio fuerit de ſubſtantia z volueris ſcire quis fit dominator eius z fuerit fecunda domus que fignificat ſubſtantiam ſcilicet quintus gradus figni arietis:quia domus eft martis habet in hoc loco mars quinq3 fortitudines:exaltatio quos est folis.7 habet in eo quattuor fortitudines.eſt ét ipfius ſolis triplicitas:7 138 eo tres fortitudines.babet ergo fol ibi ſepté fonitudines.z é termin? Jouis. z habet ibi duas fotitudines:zé ét facies martis:z bzibi vná fotitudinem ergo mars babet ibi ſex fortitudines:quinqs ex domo z vna ex facie:z fol fer pté:z talis planeta vocat almubta.i.vincens. Sol ergo accipit ibi principa tum:q2bzibi feptem fortitudines z ipſe dominatur ibi in domo fubftantie Similiter accipies in loco partis ſubſtantie z partis fortune z participemil lorum facies Jouem qui eſt ſignificator ſubſtantie naturaliter z cómifcebis partium a planetarum teftimonia:z facies bocidem de omnibus domibus ſcies dominatorem earum. D De poteftatibus accidentalibus planetarum. E poteſtatibus quoq3 planetarú accidentalibus eſt albais ideft fimilitudo:z boc eſt cu fuerit planeta diurnus in die ſuper terrá z in nocte fub terra z planeta nocturnus in nocte ſuper terram: z in die ſub terra z fi hoc fuerit masculin planeta in ſigno mascu lino:z planera femininus in figno feminino dicitur effe in ſua fimilitudine.i. in ſuo albais. Et erit fornitudo eius vt viri fortitudo in loco eius pfectusd acquifitionis arcs forrune. Differentia fecunda in naturis planetarum feptem z quid fit illis proprium z quid fignificent de effe rerum. A I quia auriliante deo iam peregimus quod propofuimus tractare de circulo fignorum z eius accidentibus.profequamur nunc inten tionem feptem planetarum z naturas cous effe quos comm 7 quid fignificent. Aturnus é mafculinus malus dis urnus z eſt ſignificator patrum fi fuerit pueri natiuitas in nocte:z fi gnificat senectutez vltimam si fue rit occidentalis:z initium senectu tis fi fuerit orientalis: 7 fignificat grauita Item frigoris z ficcitati:z ex complexione coz pozum melancolicam:z augmenti eius atqs Distillationem. Et fortaffis erit quandoqz complexio frigida bumida pon deroſa z fetidi eſt odoris:z multe comeſtionis a vere dilectionis:z fignificat profunditatem cófilij:z multitudinem filentij:z ex magiſterijs res antiquas z preciosasiz fignificat cultus agrozum z populationem terrarum z flumi num fi fuerit fortunatus:z res viles'z laboriosas si fuerit malus: vt confris cationes in balneis:7 fullones z nautas. Et si fuerit fortunatus erit vere di lectionis ſpaciofus z patiens. Et si fuerit malus erit indiscretus stabilis tris ſtis z merens male ſuſpitionis multum fufpicans z mouens homines in fu furrationibus. Et si fuerit fortunatus fignificat de ſubſtantia res antiquas z durabiles z bereditates z terre cultus: si fuerit mal fignificat aquas for didas z mali ſapozás veteres atos conuertibiles. Et ex infirmitatibus mor bos flegmaticos z melancolicos z viſcoſos 7 congelatos acutos:vt leprаз morpheam podagram 7 cancros z cetera buiufmodi:z fignificat peregris nationes longinquas carceres z vincula laborem quoqz ac tarditatem z af flictionem z almauerith idest ſubſtantias mortuorum:patres etiam z auos z fratres maiores eunuchos feruos z viles homines:z fignificat ex operis bus opera coiorum fi fuerit folus fignificator abfqz complexione alicuius planetarum. fi complectit ei Jupiter fignificat opus pgameniin quo fcri buntur diuini libri. Et si complectitur fibi mars fignificat foleas fotularium z preparationes earum. Et fi complectitur fibi fol fignificat opus confutor conorum. Et fi complectitur ei venus fignificat opus conorum ex quib? fis unt timpana z alia inſtrumenta quibus vtimur in ludis. Et fi complectitur ei mercurius fignificat opus coriozum in quibus fcribuntur teſtaméta z nu meri stipendiorum. Et si complectitur ei luna ſignificat preparatiõem cozios rum ferarum z mótanorum animalium z buiufmodi fimilia:z fignificat de fectis eam que vnitatem confitetur si fuerit fortunatus: si fuerit malus fis gnificat credentiam vnitatis cum multa tamen befitatione.i.dubitatióe. Et Dixit meſſebala.i.quem voluit deus exaltari:g fuit vnus astrologus in ſcie b tia perfpicuus iudicijs: quare fic dictus est o ſigt fidem iudaicam:ideo quia est ex antiquioribus:z omnes confitétur eam zipſa nulla aliam:fic Saturn cui omnes iungútur z ipfe nulli:figt quoqsinduméta nigra. Et dixerüt quis dam alij & Saturnus figt interioza auris z ſplenem:ac stomachumiz babz ex coloribus nigredinem:z de ſaporibus ftipticos 7 acetofſos. Et er diebus fabbatum:z ex noctibus eam que precedit quartam feriam. Et quatitas or bis eius est nouem graduű. Et anni fridarie eius funt.xi.maximi vero.465. 7 maiores.57.7 medij.43.2 dimidius:minores.30. Fotitudo eius in plagis circulié in dextra feptétrionis. Et dixit meſſebata o ligt de figuris hominú bomineminter nigrum 7 croceum:qui cum ambulauerit mergit oculos fu: os in terram poderofus inceſſu adiungés pedes.z macer recuruus babes paruos oculos:z ficcam cutem venofos raram babens barbam in marillis labia ſpiſſa callidus ingeniofus feductor interfector. Et dixit Dorothius bic figt bominem corpore valde pilosum iunctis fupercilijs:2 habet ex regioni bus Alcine z indiam z omnem terra nigrozum. Et ex partibus habés parte fortitudinis z ſtabilitatis:z ſigt terras vel res terraruz z hereditatum:zcos g plant operibus 7 audacia z laborem ingenia z caufas mostis:z bzer parti bus mundi achiud zalchint z eorum cófinia z terras nigrop z montes eop. I Upiter fortuna masculinus diurnus:7 eſt ſignificator ſubſtantie 7 operatur calorem z humiditatem temperatá aerea ſanguinea zde etatibus fignificat iunétutem vis ad pfectionez etatis:z ex magiſterijs que ptinent ad legem:vt iusta iudicia indicare:z pa cem inter boies mittere 7 in bonis ſtudere z ſubſtantie fignificat @bundátiam:z ex negocijs illa q fiunt abſs ſeductione a figť anima z vitam letitia z veritatem z religiõez z patiétiam z omne preceptum pulchru z pres cioſum zabúdantia venerisiz ex infirmitatibus a fiút ex fanguine paugme tym quátitatis que no fuerit fupflua extra naturăinec ex fanguine vito z co vertibili:z est planeta ſapiétie z intellectus z vſus. Lui si complectitur fatur nus ſigt nigromátiam zincantationes z exorcifmos ré. Et fi complectitur ei Mars fignificat fcientiam medicine. Et fi complectitur ei ſol fignificat feciss entiam fectarum z prudétiani in cötentionibus a difputatióibus. Et si cople ctitur ei Uenus ſigt cópofitionem ſonorum aliarum ſciétiarum delectabi lium. Et fi complectit ei Mercurius ſigt ſciam arithmetice z ſcribedi:astro nomia quoqz z pbiam a geometria. Et si complectiť ei luna ſigt ſciam difpo Ati
translation: through causes of medicine and astronomy, and through spiritual and similar works, and it signifies through its presence in the tenth house, through agreements and negotiations, and through wives, and through the king's causes. The presence of the lord of the fourth house signifies fortune from cultivation of the land and its fruit, through the causes of fathers and ancient things, and through its presence in the ascendant it signifies fortune from cultivation of the land and its fruit, through ingenuity and depth of counsel; and its presence in the tenth house signifies profit from cultivation of the land and its fruit, through the causes of the king and magistracies. And its presence in the seventh house signifies fortune from cultivation of the land and its fruit, through the causes of wives and fates, and through negotiations. These are signified by the lords of the angles through their presence in their angles. Similarly, therefore, you will do concerning the presence of the lords of the other houses; and therefore we have introduced only the lords of the angles so that it might be an example for the others.

title: How to Know the Dominant Planet

translation: When you wish to know the planet that dominates a matter, look at which planet has the most authority in the house of the matter and the planet that signifies the nature of that matter, as we will say in the natures of the planets. Therefore, see which of the planets is stronger in the house of the matter and what part it has of the strengths we have mentioned, that is, from the number we mentioned when we discussed the strength and power of the planets, and whichever is strongest of all in the place of the matter, that will be its dominator. For example, if the question is about substance and you wish to know who its dominator is, and the second house, which signifies substance, is the fifth degree of the sign of Aries: because it is the house of Mars, Mars has five strengths in this place; the exaltation of the Sun is there, and it has four strengths in it. It is also the Sun's triplicity, and it has three strengths there. Therefore, the Sun has seven strengths there. And it is the term of Jupiter, and it has two strengths there. And it is also the face of Mars, and it has one strength there. Therefore, Mars has six strengths there: five from the house and one from the face; and the Sun has seven. And such a planet is called Almubta, that is, conquering. Therefore, the Sun takes precedence there, because it has seven strengths there, and it dominates there in the house of substance. Similarly, you will take into account the place of the part of substance and the part of fortune, and you will make Jupiter, who is naturally the significator of substance, a participant in them, and you will combine the testimonies of the parts and the planets; and you will do the same for all the houses to know their dominator.

author: Alchabitius
title: Accidental Powers of Planets
text: nes per causas medicine atqz astronomieset per opera ſpiritualia atopinge nie et confimiliat et fignificat per preſentiam fuamin.x.fonunaz per couens tiones et negociatiões et per vrozes et per causas regis. Presentia vero do mini örte i quarta ſignificat fortună ex cultu terreret fructu per caufas pa trum atos res antiquasiet per plentiam eius in afcendete fignificat fortuna ex cultu terre et fructu per ingenium et confilij pfunditaté: et preſentia fua in.x.fignificat pfectum ex cultu terre et fructu per causas regis et magiste riorum. Et pritia ſua in ſeptima ſignificat fortunam ex cultu terre et fructus per caufas vroum et fatorum:et per negociationes. Dec fignificant domis ni angulorum per preſentiaz fuam in angulis fuis. Similiter ergo facies de preſentia dominorum ceterarum domorum:et ideo introduximus tm dominos angulorum vt effet exemplar in ceteris. E Qualiter ſciatur quis planeta fit dominator. I cú volueris ſcire planeta dominatorem rei afpicias quis plas netarum fit pluris auctoritatis in domo reiset planetam q fignis ficat naturam illius rei:ficut dicemus in naturis planetaruz. vis de ergo quis planetaruzfit fortior in domoreiteti parte eius ex fortitudinibus quas prediximus ideft ex numero quem prediximus duz de fortitudine planetaruz et poteftate tractauimus et qui fortior omnibus fue rit in loco reisipfe erit dominator eius: verbi gratia:fi interrogatio fuerit de ſubſtantia z volueris ſcire quis fit dominator eius z fuerit fecunda domus que fignificat ſubſtantiam ſcilicet quintus gradus figni arietis:quia domus eft martis habet in hoc loco mars quinq3 fortitudines:exaltatio quos est folis.7 habet in eo quattuor fortitudines.eſt ét ipfius ſolis triplicitas:7 138 eo tres fortitudines.babet ergo fol ibi ſepté fonitudines.z é termin? Jouis. z habet ibi duas fotitudines:zé ét facies martis:z bzibi vná fotitudinem ergo mars babet ibi ſex fortitudines:quinqs ex domo z vna ex facie:z fol fer pté:z talis planeta vocat almubta.i.vincens. Sol ergo accipit ibi principa tum:q2bzibi feptem fortitudines z ipſe dominatur ibi in domo fubftantie Similiter accipies in loco partis ſubſtantie z partis fortune z participemil lorum facies Jouem qui eſt ſignificator ſubſtantie naturaliter z cómifcebis partium a planetarum teftimonia:z facies bocidem de omnibus domibus ſcies dominatorem earum. D De poteftatibus accidentalibus planetarum. E poteſtatibus quoq3 planetarú accidentalibus eſt albais ideft fimilitudo:z boc eſt cu fuerit planeta diurnus in die ſuper terrá z in nocte fub terra z planeta nocturnus in nocte ſuper terram: z in die ſub terra z fi hoc fuerit masculin planeta in ſigno mascu lino:z planera femininus in figno feminino dicitur effe in ſua fimilitudine.i. in ſuo albais. Et erit fornitudo eius vt viri fortitudo in loco eius pfectusd acquifitionis arcs forrune. Differentia fecunda in naturis planetarum feptem z quid fit illis proprium z quid fignificent de effe rerum. A I quia auriliante deo iam peregimus quod propofuimus tractare de circulo fignorum z eius accidentibus.profequamur nunc inten tionem feptem planetarum z naturas cous effe quos comm 7 quid fignificent. Aturnus é mafculinus malus dis urnus z eſt ſignificator patrum fi fuerit pueri natiuitas in nocte:z fi gnificat senectutez vltimam si fue rit occidentalis:z initium senectu tis fi fuerit orientalis: 7 fignificat grauita Item frigoris z ficcitati:z ex complexione coz pozum melancolicam:z augmenti eius atqs Distillationem. Et fortaffis erit quandoqz complexio frigida bumida pon deroſa z fetidi eſt odoris:z multe comeſtionis a vere dilectionis:z fignificat profunditatem cófilij:z multitudinem filentij:z ex magiſterijs res antiquas z preciosasiz fignificat cultus agrozum z populationem terrarum z flumi num fi fuerit fortunatus:z res viles'z laboriosas si fuerit malus: vt confris cationes in balneis:7 fullones z nautas. Et si fuerit fortunatus erit vere di lectionis ſpaciofus z patiens. Et si fuerit malus erit indiscretus stabilis tris ſtis z merens male ſuſpitionis multum fufpicans z mouens homines in fu furrationibus. Et si fuerit fortunatus fignificat de ſubſtantia res antiquas z durabiles z bereditates z terre cultus: si fuerit mal fignificat aquas for didas z mali ſapozás veteres atos conuertibiles. Et ex infirmitatibus mor bos flegmaticos z melancolicos z viſcoſos 7 congelatos acutos:vt leprаз morpheam podagram 7 cancros z cetera buiufmodi:z fignificat peregris nationes longinquas carceres z vincula laborem quoqz ac tarditatem z af flictionem z almauerith idest ſubſtantias mortuorum:patres etiam z auos z fratres maiores eunuchos feruos z viles homines:z fignificat ex operis bus opera coiorum fi fuerit folus fignificator abfqz complexione alicuius planetarum. fi complectit ei Jupiter fignificat opus pgameniin quo fcri buntur diuini libri. Et si complectitur fibi mars fignificat foleas fotularium z preparationes earum. Et fi complectitur fibi fol fignificat opus confutor conorum. Et fi complectitur ei venus fignificat opus conorum ex quib? fis unt timpana z alia inſtrumenta quibus vtimur in ludis. Et fi complectitur ei mercurius fignificat opus coriozum in quibus fcribuntur teſtaméta z nu meri stipendiorum. Et si complectitur ei luna ſignificat preparatiõem cozios rum ferarum z mótanorum animalium z buiufmodi fimilia:z fignificat de fectis eam que vnitatem confitetur si fuerit fortunatus: si fuerit malus fis gnificat credentiam vnitatis cum multa tamen befitatione.i.dubitatióe. Et Dixit meſſebala.i.quem voluit deus exaltari:g fuit vnus astrologus in ſcie b tia perfpicuus iudicijs: quare fic dictus est o ſigt fidem iudaicam:ideo quia est ex antiquioribus:z omnes confitétur eam zipſa nulla aliam:fic Saturn cui omnes iungútur z ipfe nulli:figt quoqsinduméta nigra. Et dixerüt quis dam alij & Saturnus figt interioza auris z ſplenem:ac stomachumiz babz ex coloribus nigredinem:z de ſaporibus ftipticos 7 acetofſos. Et er diebus fabbatum:z ex noctibus eam que precedit quartam feriam. Et quatitas or bis eius est nouem graduű. Et anni fridarie eius funt.xi.maximi vero.465. 7 maiores.57.7 medij.43.2 dimidius:minores.30. Fotitudo eius in plagis circulié in dextra feptétrionis. Et dixit meſſebata o ligt de figuris hominú bomineminter nigrum 7 croceum:qui cum ambulauerit mergit oculos fu: os in terram poderofus inceſſu adiungés pedes.z macer recuruus babes paruos oculos:z ficcam cutem venofos raram babens barbam in marillis labia ſpiſſa callidus ingeniofus feductor interfector. Et dixit Dorothius bic figt bominem corpore valde pilosum iunctis fupercilijs:2 habet ex regioni bus Alcine z indiam z omnem terra nigrozum. Et ex partibus habés parte fortitudinis z ſtabilitatis:z ſigt terras vel res terraruz z hereditatum:zcos g plant operibus 7 audacia z laborem ingenia z caufas mostis:z bzer parti bus mundi achiud zalchint z eorum cófinia z terras nigrop z montes eop. I Upiter fortuna masculinus diurnus:7 eſt ſignificator ſubſtantie 7 operatur calorem z humiditatem temperatá aerea ſanguinea zde etatibus fignificat iunétutem vis ad pfectionez etatis:z ex magiſterijs que ptinent ad legem:vt iusta iudicia indicare:z pa cem inter boies mittere 7 in bonis ſtudere z ſubſtantie fignificat @bundátiam:z ex negocijs illa q fiunt abſs ſeductione a figť anima z vitam letitia z veritatem z religiõez z patiétiam z omne preceptum pulchru z pres cioſum zabúdantia venerisiz ex infirmitatibus a fiút ex fanguine paugme tym quátitatis que no fuerit fupflua extra naturăinec ex fanguine vito z co vertibili:z est planeta ſapiétie z intellectus z vſus. Lui si complectitur fatur nus ſigt nigromátiam zincantationes z exorcifmos ré. Et fi complectitur ei Mars fignificat fcientiam medicine. Et fi complectitur ei ſol fignificat feciss entiam fectarum z prudétiani in cötentionibus a difputatióibus. Et si cople ctitur ei Uenus ſigt cópofitionem ſonorum aliarum ſciétiarum delectabi lium. Et fi complectit ei Mercurius ſigt ſciam arithmetice z ſcribedi:astro nomia quoqz z pbiam a geometria. Et si complectiť ei luna ſigt ſciam difpo Ati
translation: Among the accidental powers of the planets is Albais, that is, similarity; and this is when a diurnal planet is above the earth by day and below the earth by night, and a nocturnal planet is above the earth by night and below the earth by day. And if this is a masculine planet in a masculine sign, and a feminine planet in a feminine sign, it is said to be in its similarity, that is, in its Albais. And its strength will be like the strength of a man in its perfect place of acquisition and fortune. The second difference in the natures of the seven planets, and what is proper to them, and what they signify concerning the essence of things. And since, with God's help, we have now completed what we proposed to discuss concerning the circle of the signs and its accidents, let us now pursue the intention of the seven planets and their natures, what they have in common, and what they signify.

title: Nature and Significations of Saturn

translation: Saturn is masculine, malefic, diurnal, and is the significator of fathers if the child's nativity is at night; and it signifies ultimate old age if it is occidental; and the beginning of old age if it is oriental; and it signifies gravity, coldness, and dryness; and from the complexion of bodies, melancholic; and its increase and distillation. And perhaps it will sometimes be a cold, humid, ponderous, and fetid complexion; and much eating and true affection; and it signifies depth of counsel; and much silence; and from magistracies, ancient and precious things; and it signifies cultivation of fields and population of lands and rivers if it is fortunate; and vile and laborious things if it is malefic, such as friction in baths, fullers, and sailors. And if it is fortunate, it will be of true affection, spacious, and patient. And if it is malefic, it will be indiscreet, stable, sad, and sorrowful, of evil suspicion, very suspicious, and moving people to whisperings. And if it is fortunate, it signifies from substance ancient and durable things, and inheritances, and cultivation of land; if it is malefic, it signifies dirty waters and bad-tasting, old, and convertible things. And from infirmities, phlegmatic and melancholic and viscous and congealed acute diseases, such as leprosy, morphea, gout, and cancers and other such things; and it signifies long journeys, prisons, and bonds, also labor and slowness, and affliction, and almauerith, that is, the substances of the dead; also fathers and grandfathers and older brothers, eunuchs, servants, and vile men; and it signifies from works the works of skins if it is the sole significator without the complexion of any other planets. If Jupiter is conjoined with it, it signifies the work of parchment on which divine books are written. And if Mars is conjoined with it, it signifies shoe soles and their preparations. And if the Sun is conjoined with it, it signifies the work of shoemakers. And if Venus is conjoined with it, it signifies the work of skins from which drums and other instruments we use in games are made. And if Mercury is conjoined with it, it signifies the work of skins on which testaments and payrolls are written. And if the Moon is conjoined with it, it signifies the preparation of skins of wild animals and mountain animals and similar things; and it signifies from sects that which confesses unity if it is fortunate; if it is malefic, it signifies belief in unity with much hesitation, that is, doubt. And Messahala, whom God wished to exalt, who was an astrologer very clear in judgments, said: why is it said that it signifies the Jewish faith? Because it is among the most ancient, and all confess it, and it no other; thus Saturn, to whom all are joined, and he to none; it also signifies black garments. And some others said that Saturn signifies the inner parts of the ear and the spleen, and the stomach; and it has blackness from colors; and from tastes, astringent and sour. And from days, Saturday; and from nights, that which precedes Wednesday. And the quantity of its orb is nine degrees. And the years of its firdaria are eleven, the greatest 465, and the greater 57, and the middle 43 and a half, the lesser 30. Its strength in the regions of the circle is to the right of the north. And Messahala said that it signifies among human figures a man between black and yellow, who, when he walks, casts his eyes to the ground, ponderous in gait, joining his feet, and thin, stooped, having small eyes, and dry skin, veiny, having a sparse beard on his jaws, thick lips, cunning, ingenious, seducer, killer. And Dorotheus said that this signifies a very hairy man with joined eyebrows; and it has from regions Alcina and India and all the land of the blacks. And from parts, it has the part of strength and stability; and it signifies lands or things of lands and inheritances; and those who work in works and audacity and labor, ingenuity and causes of death; and it has from the parts of the world Achid and Alchint and their confines and the lands of the blacks and their mountains.

title: Nature and Significations of Jupiter

Jouis. z habet ibi duas fotitudines:zé ét facies martis:z bzibi vná fotitudinem ergo mars babet ibi ſex fortitudines:quinqs ex domo z vna ex facie:z fol fer pté:z talis planeta vocat almubta.i.vincens. Sol ergo accipit ibi principa tum:q2bzibi feptem fortitudines z ipſe dominatur ibi in domo fubftantie Similiter accipies in loco partis ſubſtantie z partis fortune z participemil lorum facies Jouem qui eſt ſignificator ſubſtantie naturaliter z cómifcebis partium a planetarum teftimonia:z facies bocidem de omnibus domibus ſcies dominatorem earum. D De poteftatibus accidentalibus planetarum. E poteſtatibus quoq3 planetarú accidentalibus eſt albais ideft fimilitudo:z boc eſt cu fuerit planeta diurnus in die ſuper terrá z in nocte fub terra z planeta nocturnus in nocte ſuper terram: z in die ſub terra z fi hoc fuerit masculin planeta in ſigno mascu lino:z planera femininus in figno feminino dicitur effe in ſua fimilitudine.i. in ſuo albais. Et erit fornitudo eius vt viri fortitudo in loco eius pfectusd acquifitionis arcs forrune. Differentia fecunda in naturis planetarum feptem z quid fit illis proprium z quid fignificent de effe rerum. A I quia auriliante deo iam peregimus quod propofuimus tractare de circulo fignorum z eius accidentibus.profequamur nunc inten tionem feptem planetarum z naturas cous effe quos comm 7 quid fignificent. Aturnus é mafculinus malus dis urnus z eſt ſignificator patrum fi fuerit pueri natiuitas in nocte:z fi gnificat senectutez vltimam si fue rit occidentalis:z initium senectu tis fi fuerit orientalis: 7 fignificat grauita Item frigoris z ficcitati:z ex complexione coz pozum melancolicam:z augmenti eius atqs Distillationem. Et fortaffis erit quandoqz complexio frigida bumida pon deroſa z fetidi eſt odoris:z multe comeſtionis a vere dilectionis:z fignificat profunditatem cófilij:z multitudinem filentij:z ex magiſterijs res antiquas z preciosasiz fignificat cultus agrozum z populationem terrarum z flumi num fi fuerit fortunatus:z res viles'z laboriosas si fuerit malus: vt confris cationes in balneis:7 fullones z nautas. Et si fuerit fortunatus erit vere di lectionis ſpaciofus z patiens. Et si fuerit malus erit indiscretus stabilis tris ſtis z merens male ſuſpitionis multum fufpicans z mouens homines in fu furrationibus. Et si fuerit fortunatus fignificat de ſubſtantia res antiquas z durabiles z bereditates z terre cultus: si fuerit mal fignificat aquas for didas z mali ſapozás veteres atos conuertibiles. Et ex infirmitatibus mor bos flegmaticos z melancolicos z viſcoſos 7 congelatos acutos:vt leprаз morpheam podagram 7 cancros z cetera buiufmodi:z fignificat peregris nationes longinquas carceres z vincula laborem quoqz ac tarditatem z af flictionem z almauerith idest ſubſtantias mortuorum:patres etiam z auos z fratres maiores eunuchos feruos z viles homines:z fignificat ex operis bus opera coiorum fi fuerit folus fignificator abfqz complexione alicuius planetarum. fi complectit ei Jupiter fignificat opus pgameniin quo fcri buntur diuini libri. Et si complectitur fibi mars fignificat foleas fotularium z preparationes earum. Et fi complectitur fibi fol fignificat opus confutor conorum. Et fi complectitur ei venus fignificat opus conorum ex quib? fis unt timpana z alia inſtrumenta quibus vtimur in ludis. Et fi complectitur ei mercurius fignificat opus coriozum in quibus fcribuntur teſtaméta z nu meri stipendiorum. Et si complectitur ei luna ſignificat preparatiõem cozios rum ferarum z mótanorum animalium z buiufmodi fimilia:z fignificat de fectis eam que vnitatem confitetur si fuerit fortunatus: si fuerit malus fis gnificat credentiam vnitatis cum multa tamen befitatione.i.dubitatióe. Et Dixit meſſebala.i.quem voluit deus exaltari:g fuit vnus astrologus in ſcie b tia perfpicuus iudicijs: quare fic dictus est o ſigt fidem iudaicam:ideo quia est ex antiquioribus:z omnes confitétur eam zipſa nulla aliam:fic Saturn cui omnes iungútur z ipfe nulli:figt quoqsinduméta nigra. Et dixerüt quis dam alij & Saturnus figt interioza auris z ſplenem:ac stomachumiz babz ex coloribus nigredinem:z de ſaporibus ftipticos 7 acetofſos. Et er diebus fabbatum:z ex noctibus eam que precedit quartam feriam. Et quatitas or bis eius est nouem graduű. Et anni fridarie eius funt.xi.maximi vero.465. 7 maiores.57.7 medij.43.2 dimidius:minores.30. Fotitudo eius in plagis circulié in dextra feptétrionis. Et dixit meſſebata o ligt de figuris hominú bomineminter nigrum 7 croceum:qui cum ambulauerit mergit oculos fu: os in terram poderofus inceſſu adiungés pedes.z macer recuruus babes paruos oculos:z ficcam cutem venofos raram babens barbam in marillis labia ſpiſſa callidus ingeniofus feductor interfector. Et dixit Dorothius bic figt bominem corpore valde pilosum iunctis fupercilijs:2 habet ex regioni bus Alcine z indiam z omnem terra nigrozum. Et ex partibus habés parte fortitudinis z ſtabilitatis:z ſigt terras vel res terraruz z hereditatum:zcos g plant operibus 7 audacia z laborem ingenia z caufas mostis:z bzer parti bus mundi achiud zalchint z eorum cófinia z terras nigrop z montes eop. I Upiter fortuna masculinus diurnus:7 eſt ſignificator ſubſtantie 7 operatur calorem z humiditatem temperatá aerea ſanguinea zde etatibus fignificat iunétutem vis ad pfectionez etatis:z ex magiſterijs que ptinent ad legem:vt iusta iudicia indicare:z pa cem inter boies mittere 7 in bonis ſtudere z ſubſtantie fignificat @bundátiam:z ex negocijs illa q fiunt abſs ſeductione a figť anima z vitam letitia z veritatem z religiõez z patiétiam z omne preceptum pulchru z pres cioſum zabúdantia venerisiz ex infirmitatibus a fiút ex fanguine paugme tym quátitatis que no fuerit fupflua extra naturăinec ex fanguine vito z co vertibili:z est planeta ſapiétie z intellectus z vſus. Lui si complectitur fatur nus ſigt nigromátiam zincantationes z exorcifmos ré. Et fi complectitur ei Mars fignificat fcientiam medicine. Et fi complectitur ei ſol fignificat feciss entiam fectarum z prudétiani in cötentionibus a difputatióibus. Et si cople ctitur ei Uenus ſigt cópofitionem ſonorum aliarum ſciétiarum delectabi lium. Et fi complectit ei Mercurius ſigt ſciam arithmetice z ſcribedi:astro nomia quoqz z pbiam a geometria. Et si complectiť ei luna ſigt ſciam difpo Ati
translation: Jupiter is fortunate, masculine, diurnal; and it is the significator of substance and produces temperate heat and humidity, airy, sanguine; and from ages, it signifies youth up to the perfection of age; and from magistracies that pertain to law, such as judging just judgments, and bringing peace among men, and striving for good things; and it signifies abundance of substance; and from negotiations, those that are done without deception; and it signifies soul and life, joy and truth and religion and patience and every beautiful and precious precept and abundance of Venus; and from infirmities that arise from blood by an increase of quantity that is not superfluous beyond nature, nor from vitiated and convertible blood; and it is the planet of wisdom and intellect and use. To whom if Saturn is conjoined, it signifies necromancy and incantations and exorcisms. And if Mars is conjoined with it, it signifies the science of medicine. And if the Sun is conjoined with it, it signifies the science of sects and prudence in contentions and disputes. And if Venus is conjoined with it, it signifies the composition of sounds and other delightful sciences. And if Mercury is conjoined with it, it signifies the science of arithmetic and writing; also astronomy and philosophy and geometry. And if the Moon is conjoined with it, it signifies the science of disposition.

author: Alchabitius
title: Venus: Feminine, Nocturnal, Cold and Humid
text: ==Start of OCR for page 1== Enus fortuna feminina nocturna z eft fignificatrix mulierum z vrozum ac matrum fi fuerit natiuitas diurna z opetatur frigus zbumiditatem temperatá:7 ex erate habet iuuétutem vel ados lefcentiam:z ex magiſterijs inftruméta ludorum omaméta quo 03 7 figuras pulchras z ludos alearum a ſchacorum z faltatio nes z ocia z fornicationes ac fornicatores z filios fornicationis z multitudi nem coitus:z vniuerfa genera luxurie z compoſitiones coronarum z vſus earum:z pulchritudinem ac mundiciam veſtiméta eriam z ornamenta.Au rum z argétum dilectionem ludos rifus a gaudium z vnguétis diuerfifqz ſpeciebus vti potationes a ebrietates:feqs credit omnibusilargitatem quos offigtiz dilectionem diligétiam z amozem iufticiam z domos orationis reti net quos fidemiz ſigt magiſterium omnium fignorum veluti muſicam'zč. fi complectitur ei Saturnus figt ſonum cantationum quibus deflétur ali quando mortui vel quas cantant edificatores quando odificant edificia. Et fi complectitur ei Jupiter ſigt ſonum lectionum vel cantationű quibus vtűs tur Domini ſectarum in altaribus z locis orationis eorum in laudem dei om nipotentis. Et fi Mars fignat ſonos quibus vtūtur ſeculares a cantus vuls giin quibus fit mentio blafphemie vel preliozumivel in quo fit mentio car ceris vel labois z borum ſimilia:vt cantus in quo fit mentio captionis 7 al ligationis z percuffionis flagellorum. Si Sol fignat fonum ligni quo canta tur coram regibus z nobilibus. Si Mercurius fonum qui exerceturin có pofitione verfuum. Et si Luna fignificat cantus nautarum in nauibus. Et ex infirmitatibus morbos habet frigidos z humidos q accidit proprie a mul totiens in membus genitalibus. Et ex ſubſtatia que acquiritur propter puls chritudinem:vt ſunt ornaméta mulierum:z veſtimenta carnm margaritas atos picturas. Et ex qualitate animi fuauitatem z amiciciamiz comeſtionez z bis familiarz cupiditates potióis a comeſtionis ac coitus. Et er ſectis cul turam idolorum:r eos in quibus maxime exercentur comeſtiones atospo tationes. Et dixerüt quidam o ſignificat anchas z ſpinam doch z fperma. Et alij dixerunt & babet ſignificare pinguedinem a carnes trenes i vuluá matricem ventrem pectinem z vmbilicum. Et habet ex coloribus albedies: tex ſaporibus vnctuofum.Et quátitas orbis eius.7.graduum. Et babzer diebus diem Ueneris:z ex noctibus noctem martis. Et anni fridarie eius funt octo. Et anni eins maiores.82.maximi.isiz medij.45.minores vero 8.Fortitudo ei in plagis circuli eſt in dextra orientis. Et dixit Meſceala fignat de figuris hominum hominem album trabentem ad nigrediné puls chri corporis a capilloruni:faciem habentem rotundam:z paruam babens tem maxillam pulchros oculos:z eius nigredo oculorum est plusqz opoz tet. Et dixit Dorothius fignat hominem pulchram faciem babentem puls chros oculos z multos capillos 7 plus album 'confectum rubore craffum oftendentem beniuolentiam. Et babet ex partibus partem defiderij z figni ficat amicitiam z ludum z Dilectionem z patientia r coniunctiones mafcu orum. Et babet ex partibus mundi albiget z aliemé z terras arabum. ==End of OCR for page 1== ==Start of OCR for page 2== M Ercurius cómixtus mafculinus diurnus inclinatur p naturam ſuá ad eum qui complectiť ex planetis z ex fignis:z eſt ſignifica to fratrum minox:7 fignificat feruos z dilectióez cócubinaruz fignat etiam deitatem z oracula prophetaruz z credulitatem z opus a honorem vel oratione. Qui si in natura sua fuerit z nul Ins planeta ei complectitur fignificat res terreas a rerum augmétationem creſcendo:z ex etate iuuétutem:z pfectum in eaiz ex operibus opa que ges nerant cognitioné predicationem z rhetoricam z negociatiões 7 extimatios nem z geometria:z diſpoſitioné reiz philofophiam z auguria z puerbia z ſcripturam:z verfificádi ſcientiam z opus numeri maxime.Luish complectit Saturnus fignificat ex opere numeri opus méſure terrarum z bereditatuz 7 numex edificiorum atqz telari.Si Jupiter Agnat numerum prallédi z nu merum libzorú diuinorum. Si Mars fignificat numex qui fit in donatiuis exercituů z pugnatium a numerum pcuſſionum flagellorum atqs clauaruz. Si Sol fignat preeſſe numero regum z ſubſtatie domor. Si Uenus fignat numerum chordarum lignoy ſeu cytbararum numerum ſonor ates fistu larum.Si Luna fignat numerum ferculorum que fiunt ad comeftiones itis nerantium extra domum. Et fignat de infirmitatibus infirmitates ſpirituas les anime.i.cogitatiões horribiles:7 inquietudiné métis atqz dubitationes 7 cetera fimilia. Significat etiam animi qualitaté zë fimulia kim cóplexionez ſuá z cóiunctioné: cú fuerit fonunat erut bonitates im genus fortune que facit eum fortunatum:7 Fm locum in quo fuerint fortunatus mercurius:z cú fuerit malus erút iniquitates Fm malum qo eu facit malum:7 Fm locum in quo factus est malus. Et fignificat ex fectis culturam vnitatis 7 borum fi milia:z boc fecreto cú bypocrisia z ſimulatione. Et dixerüt quidam o ſigni ficat femora vmbilicum z pectinem a crura neruos atqzuenas z ex coloris bus habet omnem coloré commixtuates variatú:zalez meniu qui eſt color floris lilij agreftis:z ex faporibus acetoſum. Et quátitas orbis eius eft.7.gra duú:z habet er diebus diem mercurij:7 ex noctibus noctem diei dominice. Anni fridarie eius funt.az anni eius maiores.76.maximi.460.medij.48. minores vero.20.foritudo eius in plagis circuli eſt in ſeptéirione. Et dire runt quidam mercurius a medio retrogradationis eius vis ad ſtationem fecundam fignificat pueritiamiz a ratione fecúda vſqz ad coniunctionem folis iuuentutemiz a coniunctione ſolis vios ad ftationem primam mediam etatem:z a ſtatione ſua prima vſqz ad medium retrogradationis fignificat fenectutem z cótrarietatem in coniunctione fua per directionem vlfqz ad ſtationem primam fignificat dilectionem z amicitiam z amoris imitationes: 7 ex ftatione fua fecunda ad coniunctionem iens ſignificat inquifitionem dis lectionis a concordiam:7 a tatione ſua prima iens iterum ad retrogradas tionem fignificat inquifitionem contrarietatis z diſſimilationis tarditatem zverecundiam paruam z occupationem 7 stuporem in rebus:z in medio re trogradationis fignificat celeritatem temperatam ppter ingenij debilitas tem.z apud ftationem fecundam fignificat ftuporem z occupationem ins genij z tarditatem z egreſſus ab hac celeritatem z apertionem ingenioruz ==End of OCR for page 2== ==Start of OCR for page 3== coniunctione fua foli per directionem fignificat celeritatem ex paffionem ingeniozum z latitudinem vel augmentationem eorum. Similiter Ueneri accidit in bis locis 7 planetis altiorib? Et dixit meſceala, mercurius fignifis cat ex figuris bominem non multum album neqs nigrum babentem colo rem:frontem babentem eleuatam a longam:in facie longitudinem z nafuz longum:raram babentem barbam in maxillis z oculos pulchros non ex to to nigros:longos quos habentem digitos. Et ex partibus habet parté nes gociationis: fignificat timorem infestationem z bellum zinimicicias z fes ductiones a contrarietates:fignificat quoqs pfectum magifterium z fubtilis tarem in opere z inquifitione:z in ceteris que fiunt in hominibus ex actis 7 contentionibus. Et ex terris habet adelech alcuidem z maxime in meridie: terras indorum. 7 Una fortuna feminina nocturna operať frigiditatem z humidi tatem: ex fignificatrix matrum: fi fuerit natiuitas nocturna 7 eft in ea falſa temperatum a ſignificat etatem puerilem z initiuz crefcendi. Et ex operibus habet legationes z madata:z ope ra aquarum atqz terrarum Fm quátitatem fortunij vel infortu nij vel mali o fi fuerit bona fignificat bonum & econuerfo.Significat etiam principatum fi prefuerit vel fuerit Domina aliquibus rebus ad regem perti nentibus fi fuerit fortunata a ſole in bono afpectu z in bono loco. [ Etde fubftantia fignificat argentum z terre cultum fi babuerit auctoritatem in quarta z ex fide religionem.Et ex infirmitatibus epilenſiam paraliſim guttá Caducam z vultus torſionem enodationem membrorum a commotionem: z quicquid fuerit in fimilitudine frigoris 7 humiditatis. Et qualitatem anis miam coniunctionem fuam cum planetis. Luificomplectitur for
translation: Venus, a feminine, nocturnal fortune, signifies women, wives, and mothers if the nativity is diurnal. She operates with temperate coldness and humidity. From age, she signifies youth or adolescence. From crafts, she signifies instruments of games, ornaments, beautiful figures, games of dice and chess, dances, idleness, fornication and fornicators, and children of fornication, and a multitude of coitus, and all kinds of luxury, and the composition and use of crowns, and beauty and cleanliness of clothing and ornaments. Gold and silver, affection, games, laughter and joy, and the use of ointments and various spices, drinks and intoxications. She believes in all those she gives generously to, and signifies affection, diligence, love, justice, and houses of prayer, which she holds faithfully. She signifies the mastery of all signs, such as music, etc. If Saturn aspects her, she signifies the sound of songs with which the dead are sometimes lamented, or which builders sing when they build edifices. And if Jupiter aspects her, she signifies the sound of readings or songs which the lords of sects use in their altars and places of prayer in praise of Almighty God. And if Mars signifies the sounds which secular people use, and vulgar songs in which there is mention of blasphemy or battles, or in which there is mention of prison or labor and similar things, such as a song in which there is mention of capture and binding and the striking of whips. If the Sun signifies the sound of wood with which one sings before kings and nobles. If Mercury, the sound that is exercised in the composition of verses. And if the Moon signifies the songs of sailors in ships. And from infirmities, she has cold and humid diseases which occur especially and often in the genital members. And from substance, that which is acquired for beauty, such as women's ornaments, and their clothes, pearls and paintings. And from the quality of the soul, sweetness and friendship, and eating and familiar things, and desires for drinking and eating and coitus. And from sects, the worship of idols, and those in whom eating and drinking are most practiced. And some have said that she signifies the hips and the spine, the back and sperm. And others have said that she signifies fat and fleshy parts in the vulva, uterus, belly, groin, and navel. And from colors, she has whiteness; and from tastes, oiliness. And the quantity of her orb is 7 degrees. And she has from days, the day of Venus; and from nights, the night of Mars. And the years of her firdaria are eight. And her greater years are 82, greatest 152, middle 45, but lesser 8. Her strength in the regions of the circle is to the right of the east. And Masha'allah said that she signifies, from the figures of men, a white man inclining to blackness, of beautiful body and hair, having a round face, and having a small jaw, beautiful eyes, and the blackness of her eyes is more than it should be. And Dorotheus said that she signifies a man with a beautiful face, beautiful eyes, and much hair, and more white, mixed with redness, fat, showing benevolence. And she has from parts, the part of desire, and signifies friendship and play and affection and patience and conjunctions of males. And she has from the parts of the world, Albiget and Aliemen and the lands of the Arabs.
